HPMMIS

Interface Overview

The Hawaii Prepaid Medicaid Management Information System (HPMMIS) is the mainframe system that supports healthcare claims and encounter processing, managed care enrollment, and managed care capitation payments on behalf of Hawaii’s Medicaid beneficiaries. Fee for Service (FFS) claims received by HPMMIS are managed and processed by the Medicaid Fiscal Agent. Encounter data is received in standardized formats and fed into the HPMMIS system directly from each Medicaid Managed Care Organization (MCO). HPMMIS also receives claims and encounter data where MQD serves as a Third-PartyAdministrator (TPA). After encounter and claims data are received by the HPMMIS, a data validation process runs a comprehensive series of formatting and reasonableness checks. Data that pass validation checks are moved into HPMMIS for storage alongside various reference tables. HPMMIS and the related data warehouses serve as the central data repository for all Medicaid beneficiaries in Hawaii. The HPMMIS data will include recipient, enrollment, capitation, claims and encounters, provider, and other reference data. Another data source from HPMMIS includes T-MSIS files submitted to CMS, which may be used for data validation and consistency checks.

File Details

Validation Process

Validation is handled internally by Plante and covers full and delta extracts, notifications, file zips, and SFTP movement. Extracted files are loaded into empty Synapse schema tables for comparison, and two checks are performed: a row count validation and a row-by-row validation using MD5 hash comparison. The objective is to ensure data integrity and detect any special characters that could disrupt loading. Any anomalies identified during this process are documented in a prior section.

Validation Files

Each functional area folder includes a validation file named Control_<FunctionalArea>_YYMMDDHHMMSS.zip, which contains file names, total row counts, load dates, and aggregate column details for select claims and encounters tables. Upon successful completion of an extract, a notification email is automatically generated for each domain and sent to HAP_EDW_OPERATIONS@ds.uhc.com.

Data Transfer Overview

File transfers between AHCCCS and MedQuest are conducted via SFTP at sftp.statemedicaid.us, using the path /HAO_Extracts with subfolders /PROD/IN/EVV and /PROD/OUT/EVV. All zip files are placed in /PROD/OUT and must either be removed by the MedQuest vendor after processing or retrieved using timestamp logic to ensure the correct file is pulled. Files are automatically removed from the SFTP server after 60 days, though AHCCCS retains two local copies for analysis purposes. The /PROD/IN folder is available should MedQuest need to send files back to AHCCCS.

Table Extract Details

Each functional area produces a zip file based on its refresh schedule, named using the convention FunctionalArea_YYMMDDHHMMSS — for example, Provider_20230131020030 — and files remain in the drop directory until they are moved by the MedQuest team. All files are compressed using the Linux command zip -r.

Security and Privacy Constraints

ConstraintRequirement
Highest HAP PHI Classification LevelLevel 3 - Confidential
Retention Requirements7 years

File Layout

AttributeSpecification
FormatFlat File
Row Delimiter\n (LF)
Column DelimiterComma ,
Text QualifierDouble Quote "
Column Names in First Row?Yes
File Naming Conventions_<ft/dl>_<TABLE_NAME>_Data.txt,
where s denotes a flat file, ft indicates a full table extract of the entire table, and dl indicates a delta load containing only new data since the last delivery for tables with viable date fields
Examples_ft_T_PR_ADDR_ID.txt
EncodingUTF-8

Data Dictionary

Claims and Encounters

T_EC_DNT_CLM
Column NameColumn AliasData TypeDescription
ACC_DATAccident DateDATEDate of claim for accident reported
ACCI_CAR_INDAccident - Car IndicatorCHARIndicates whether the member is seeing a provider due to a car accident
ACCI_OTHR_INDAccident - Other IndicatorCHARIndicates whether the member is seeing a provider for some other type of accident
AHCCCS_IDAHCCCS_IDCHARThe unique identifier of an individual member.
ATTCH_CTL_NOVARCHAREncounters Dental Attached Control Number
ATTCH_RPT_TYPCHARAttachment Reporting Type cd
ATTCH_TRANS_CDAuto Accident State or Province CodeCHARAttached Transaction Code
AUTO_ACC_ST_CTY_CDCHARAuto Accident State or Province Code
BIL_DATBilled DateDATEDental claim billed date
BIL_PR_IDBilling Provider IDCHARThis number is a unique identifier assigned by MQD during provider registration that identifies a person or entity that contracts with MQD or a contractor for the provision of covered services. In this instance, it identifies the provider who billed for a service.
BIL_PR_LOC_CDBilling Provider Location CodeCHARThis numeric code identifies the specific location of a service on an individual claim.
BIL_PR_NPIBilling Provider NPICHARThis numeric field shows the National Provider ID of a provider who is indicated as the payee on a specific claim.
BIL_PR_TAX_IDBilling Provider Tax IDCHARA unique tax identifier number of the billing provider as reported on a claim or encounter. Also referred to as TIN. This may contain the provider’s current or historic tax ID number. Every provider has one or more tax ID numbers attached to their registration record in HPMMIS.
BIL_PR_TAXON_CDBilling Provider Taxonomy CodeCHARThis field categorizes the type, classification, and/or specialization of the billing provider as indicated on the provider’s record.
CLM_HP_IDClaim Health Plan IDCHARThis field shows the ID number of the health plan that paid the claim.
CLM_HP_LOC_CDClaim Health Plan Location CodeCHARDental Claim Health Plan Location code
CLM_RP_DOBClaim Recipient Date of BirthDATEThe date of birth of the recipient.
CLM_RP_IDClaim Recipient IDCHARRecipient ID for the claim
CLM_RP_SEXClaim Recipient SexCHARThe sex of the recipient.
CLM_TYPClaim TypeCHARA code that represents the different claims that can be submitted.
CNTRY_CDCountry CodeCHARCountry code of dental claim
DELAY_RSN_CDDelay Reason CodeCHARReason code for claim delay
DNL_REASDenial Reason CodeCHARDenial reason code for claim
EC_NUMCHAREncounter Number
EMPT_REL_INDEmployment Related IndicatorCHAREmployment Related Indicator
ENC_CLM_INDEncounter Claim IndicatorCHARIndicates either a claim (C) or encounter (E).
ENRL_AHCCCS_IDCHAREnrollment AHCCCS_​ID
FORCE_PND_CDForce Pend CodeCHARForce Pend Code
FORM_TYPForm TypeCHARA code that represents the type of form used for a claim. There are six different form types with an alpha indicator that are categorized into 1500, UB04, ADA, and NCPDP national forms
HDR_FRZNCHARHeader Data Reporting Frozen

HP_ACCT_NUMHealth Plan Account NumberVARCHARHealth Plan Account Number
INPUT_MODEInput ModeCHARA code that represents the how the encounter was submitted and if was paid or denied.

LAST_MOD_USRLast Modified UserCHARLast Modified User
md5_hashVARCHARThe MD5 hash is built off all columns and is to be used with available primary and/or business keys included in the respective file. Is included to simplify any delta loading processes during file imports. row-by-row validation check using the hash bytes MD5 function to compare every character between the source and target tables. The primary objective, apart from confirming matching data, was to identify special characters that would cause issues with data loads

CLM_NOClaim NumberCHARA unique identifier for an individual claim or encounter assigned by MQD. The claim number is connected to the paid amount for the entire set of services and not for each individual service. It is used in the Data Warehouse for UB forms only. This number consists of the Julian date (digits 1-5), the batch number (digits 6-9), and the sequence number (digits 10-12).

INPUT_MODEInput ModeCHARA code that represents the how the encounter was submitted and if was paid or denied.
INVC_NUMInvoice NumberCHARInvoice Number
JUL_DATJulian DateCHARThe Julian date is embedded in the first five digits of a CRN (YYDDD). A Julian date is the last 2 digits of the year and 3 digits indicating the day of the year (001-366). This field contains a calendar date format MM/DD/YYYY that corresponds to the Julian date in the Claim Number. It could be used to check claim/encounter submissions on a particular date or lag times (i.e. time between date of service and date of submission).

The primary objective, apart from confirming matching data, was to identify special characters that would cause issues with data loads

ACCID_STVARCHARAccident State
ADJU_STAAdjudication StatusVARCHARA code that represents the progress of the adjudication process. The data warehouse only contains finalized claims, so valid values are: A - Approved 6 - Administrative Denial D - Denied V - Void R - Replace null
ADMSN_DATAdmission DateDATEThe month, day, and year the patient was admitted.
ADMSN_HRAdmission HourVARCHARAdmission hour values defined by UB-92 standards
ADMSN_SRCAdmission SourceVARCHARA code representing the point of origin of the patients admission. Valid values are: 1 - Non Health Care Facility 2 - Clinic 4 - Transfer from Hospital 5 - Transfer from SNF or Born Inside this Hospital 6 - Transfer from other HCF or Born Outside 8
ADMSN_TYPAdmission TypeVARCHARA code representing priority of the admission. Valid values are: 1 - Emergency 2 - Urgent 3 - Elective 4 - Newborn 5 - Trauma Center 9 - Info Not Available

BILL_TYPBill TypeVARCHARA code that is used for reporting the type of bill for third party claim processing purposes. First digit - leading zero Second digit - type of facility Third digit - type of care Fourth digit - sequence of the bill for a specific episode code
CLM_NOClaim NumberVARCHARA unique identifier for an individual claim or encounter assigned by MQD. The claim number is connected to the paid amount for the entire set of services and not for each individual service. It is used in the Data Warehouse for UB forms only. This number consists of the Julian date (digits 1-5), the batch number (digits 6-9), and the sequence number (digits 10-12).

COUNTRY_CDCountry CodeVARCHARCountry code of service
CTRT_TYPContract TypeVARCHARThis field provides the one character code that is associated with the type(s) of contract a health plan holds with MQD. Contract types indicate a particular population or set of services that a health plan may provide.

ADD_DATEDate Record AddedDATEThe date the record was added to HPMMIS. Display format is MMM DD, YYYY where MMM is a 3 character abbreviation for the month, DD is a one or two digit number of the day, and YYYY is a four digit year.

ADJU_LVLAdjudication LevelCHARThe severity of the Adjudication
ADJU_STAAdjudication StatusCHARA code that represents the progress of the adjudication process. The data warehouse only contains finalized claims, so valid values are: A - Approved 6 - Administrative Denial D - Denied V - Void R - Replace null
ADM_DATAdmit DateDATEThe month, day, and year the patient was admitted.
ADM_DIAG_CDAdmitting Diagnosis CodeCHARThis diagnosis code is provided by a health care practitioner when a patient is admitted to a hospital. This code is chosen before any medical testing has been performed to determine the true medical issue. This code may be thought of as a patient's stated reason for seeking care.
ADM_HRAdmit HourCHARThis diagnosis code is provided by a health care practitioner when a patient is admitted to a hospital. This code is chosen before any medical testing has been performed to determine the true medical issue. This code may be thought of as a patient's stated reason for seeking care.
ADM_SRCAdmit SourceCHARA code representing the point of origin of the patients admission. Valid values are: 1 - Non Health Care Facility 2 - Clinic 4 - Transfer from Hospital 5 - Transfer from SNF or Born Inside this Hospital 6 - Transfer from other HCF or Born Outside 8
ADM_TYPAdmit TypeCHARA code representing priority of the admission. Valid values are: 1 - Emergency 2 - Urgent 3 - Elective 4 - Newborn 5 - Trauma Center 9 - Info Not Available

This may contain the provider’s current or historic tax ID number. Every provider has one or more tax ID numbers attached to their registration record in HPMMIS.
BIL_PR_TAXON_CDBilling Provider Taxonomy CodeCHARThis field categorizes the type, classification, and/or specialization of the billing provider as indicated on the provider’s record.
BIL_TYPBill TypeCHARA code that is used for reporting the type of bill for third party claim processing purposes. First digit - leading zero Second digit - type of facility Third digit - type of care Fourth digit - sequence of the bill for a specific episode code
CAP_RATE_CDCHARCapitation Rate Code
CATEG_INDCategory IndicatorCHARCategory Indicator
CLM_COSClaim Category of ServiceCHARA code that represents a grouping of services as defined in PMMIS.
CLM_HP_IDClaim Health Plan IDCHARThis field shows the ID number of the health plan that paid the claim.
CLM_HP_LOC_CDClaim Health Plan Location CodeCHARFacility Claim Health Plan Location code
CLM_NOClaim NumberCHARA unique identifier for an individual claim or encounter assigned by MQD. The claim number is connected to the paid amount for the entire set of services and not for each individual service. It is used in the Data Warehouse for UB forms only. This number consists of the Julian date (digits 1-5), the batch number (digits 6-9), and the sequence number (digits 10-12).
CLM_RP_DOBClaim Recipient Date of BirthDATEThe date of birth of the recipient.
CLM_RP_IDClaim Recipient IDCHARRecipient ID for the claim
CLM_RP_SEXClaim Recipient SexCHARThe sex of the recipient.
CLM_TYPClaim TypeCHARA code that represents the different claims that can be submitted.
CLN_CLM_DATClean Claim DateDATEThe latest date the claim passed all edits in PMMIS. Display format is MMM DD, YYYY where MMM is a 3 character abbreviation for the month, DD is a one or two digit number of the day, and YYYY is a four digit year. The billing date for the claim.
CN1_CODECN1 CodeCHARA code that represents the type of contract the payer has with the provider. Not applicable for Claims. Valid values for Encounters are: 01 - DRG based 02 - Per Diem 03 - Variable Per Diem 04 - Flat 05 - Capitated 06 - Percent 09 - Other
CND_CD_1Condition Code 1CHARA code used to identify conditions relating to the claim that may affect payer processing.
CND_CD_10Condition Code 10CHARA code used to identify conditions relating to the claim that may affect payer processing.
CND_CD_11Condition Code 11CHARA code used to identify conditions relating to the claim that may affect payer processing.
CND_CD_12Condition Code 12CHARA code used to identify conditions relating to the claim that may affect payer processing.
CND_CD_2Condition Code 2CHARA code used to identify conditions relating to the claim that may affect payer processing.
CND_CD_3Condition Code 3CHARA code used to identify conditions relating to the claim that may affect payer processing.
CND_CD_4Condition Code 4CHARA code used to identify conditions relating to the claim that may affect payer processing.
CND_CD_5Condition Code 5CHARA code used to identify conditions relating to the claim that may affect payer processing.
CND_CD_6Condition Code 6CHARA code used to identify conditions relating to the claim that may affect payer processing.
CND_CD_7Condition Code 7CHARA code used to identify conditions relating to the claim that may affect payer processing.
CND_CD_8Condition Code 8CHARA code used to identify conditions relating to the claim that may affect payer processing.
CND_CD_9Condition Code 9CHARA code used to identify conditions relating to the claim that may affect payer processing.
CONF_DATA_INDConfidential Data IndicatorCHARIndicator of confidential data included
COV_DAYCovered DayCHARNumber of covered days for facility claim
CRC_APPL_INDCHARCertification Condition Indicator
CRC_IND_1CHARCertification Condition Code Indicator
CRC_IND_2CHARCertification Condition Code Indicator
CRC_IND_3CHARCertification Condition Code Indicator
CRNClaim Reference Number (CRN)CHARThe unique identifier of a separately billed service on a particular claim or encounter submitted on any form type. The first 12 digits are the Claim Number and the last two are the Line Number which references each individual service or product on that bill.
CRS_INDChildren's Rehabilitation Services (CRS) IndicatorCHARChild Rehabilitation Service Facility claim details
CTRT_TYPContract TypeCHARThis field provides the one character code that is associated with the type(s) of contract a health plan holds with MQD. Contract types indicate a particular population or set of services that a health plan may provide.
DCHRG_HRDischarge HourCHARFacility claim discharge time
DELAY_RSN_CDDelay Reason CodeCHARReason code for claim delay
DNL_REASDenial Reason CodeCHARDenial reason code for claim
DRG_CDDRG CodeCHARA code representing the Diagnosis Related Group (DRG) used to classify hospital claims expected to have similar resource use.
E_DIAG_CDExternal Diagnosis CodeCHARExternal Diagnosis Code
E_POA_INDExternal Present on Admission IndicatorCHARExternal Present on Admission Indicator
ELG_KEY_CDCHAREligibility Key Code
ENC_CLM_INDEncounter Claim IndicatorCHARIndicates either a claim (C) or encounter (E).
ENC_CLM_KEYNUMBEREncounter Claim Key
ENRL_AHCCCS_IDCHAREnrollment AHCCCS_​ID
FIRST_ADJU_DATDATEFirst adjudication date
FORCE_PND_CDForce Pend CodeCHARForce Pend Code
FORM_TYPForm TypeCHARA code that represents the type of form used for a claim. There are six different form types with an alpha indicator that are categorized into 1500, UB04, ADA, and NCPDP national forms
FREQUENCY_CDFrequency CodeCHARFrequency Code
HIPAA_INDHIPAA IndicatorCHARHIPAA Indicator
HP_ALLOW_AMTHealth Plan Allowed AmountNUMBERHealth Plan Allowed Amount
HP_APPR_AMTHealth Plan Approved AmountNUMBERHealth Plan Approved Amount
HP_CLM_NOHealth Plan Claim NumberVARCHARHealth Plan Claim Number
HP_PAID_AMTHealth Plan Paid AmountNUMBERHealth Plan Paid Amount
ICD_INDICD IndicatorCHARICD Indicator
IHS_CDIHS CodeCHARIHS Code
IHS_RFRL_INDIndian Health Service (IHS) Referral IndicatorCHARIndian Health Service (IHS) Referral Indicator
INPUT_MODEInput ModeCHARA code that represents the how the encounter was submitted and if was paid or denied.
INPUT_NUM_LINEInput Line Number?NUMBERInput Line Number?
INVC_NUMInvoice NumberCHARInvoice Number
LTC_CDLong Term Care (LTC) CodeCHARLong Term Care (LTC) Code
MAN_PRC_CDCHARManual Price Code
md5_hashVARCHARThe MD5 hash is built off all columns and is to be used with available primary and/or business keys included in the respective file. Is included to simplify any delta loading processes during file imports. row-by-row validation check using the hash bytes MD5 function to compare every character between the source and target tables. The primary objective, apart from confirming matching data, was to identify special characters that would cause issues with data loads
MDC_APP_AMTMedicare Approved AmountNUMBERMedicare Approved Amount
MDC_COIN_AMTMedicare Coinsurance AmountNUMBERMedicare Coinsurance Amount
MDC_COIN_DAYMedicare Coinsurance DaysNUMBERMedicare Coinsurance Days
MDC_CVG_CDMedicare Coverage CodeCHARA code that indicates the possible different combinations of Medicare coverage.
MDC_DED_AMTMedicare Deductible AmountNUMBERMedicare Deductible Amount
MDC_LTRNUMBERMedicare Claim Letter
MDC_PAID_AMTMedicare Paid AmountNUMBERMedicare Paid Amount
MED_REC_NUMMedical Record NumberVARCHARMedical Record Identification Number
MHS_INDMental Health Service (MHS) IndicatorCHARMental Health Service (MHS) Indicator
MOD_DATERecord Modified DateDATEThe date the record was modified.
MOD_TIMERecord Modified TimeCHARThe time the record was modified.
MOD_USERRecord Modified UserCHARThe user who modified the record.
NOTE_REF_CDCHARNote Reference Code
OCC_CD_1Occurrence Code 1CHARA code and associated date defining a significant event relating to this bill that may affect payer processing.

T_CL_WORK_ACTION
Column NameColumn AliasData TypeDescription
ACT_DATDATEClaim Action Date
ADD_DATDATEClaim Added Date
ADD_TIMETime Record AddedCHARThe time the record was added to HPMMIS.
ADD_USERRecord Added UserCHARRecord Added User
BYPS_FLGCHARBypass Flag
CLM_ACT_CDCHARClaim Account Code
CLM_NOClaim NumberCHARA unique identifier for an individual claim or encounter assigned by MQD. The claim number is connected to the paid amount for the entire set of services and not for each individual service. It is used in the Data Warehouse for UB forms only. This number consists of the Julian date (digits 1-5), the batch number (digits 6-9), and the sequence number (digits 10-12).
CLM_STA_SEQClaim Status Sequence NumberCHARA number indicating how many times the claim cycled through PMMIS before being approved/denied. This numeric field is used only for fee-for-service claims. Encounters will not have a status sequence number.
CLN_CLM_DATClean Claim DateDATEThe latest date the claim passed all edits in PMMIS. Display format is MMM DD, YYYY where MMM is a 3 character abbreviation for the month, DD is a one or two digit number of the day, and YYYY is a four digit year. The billing date for the claim.
CRNClaim Reference Number (CRN)CHARThe unique identifier of a separately billed service on a particular claim or encounter submitted on any form type. The first 12 digits are the Claim Number and the last two are the Line Number which references each individual service or product on that bill.
CURRENT_RECCurrent RecordCHARThe current record for recipient
FORM_TYPForm TypeCHARA code that represents the type of form used for a claim. There are six different form types with an alpha indicator that are categorized into 1500, UB04, ADA, and NCPDP national forms
HDR_STAHeader StatusCHARHeader Status
HLD_DAYSCHARHold Days
LN_NOLine NumberCHARLine Number
LNE_STALine StatusCHARLine Status
md5_hashVARCHARThe MD5 hash is built off all columns and is to be used with available primary and/or business keys included in the respective file. Is included to simplify any delta loading processes during file imports. row-by-row validation check using the hash bytes MD5 function to compare every character between the source and target tables. The primary objective, apart from confirming matching data, was to identify special characters that would cause issues with data loads

REASONCHARReason for service
REASON_TYPCHARReason Type
SOURCECHARSource Data

WRK_TYPCHARWork Type

md5_hashVARCHARThe MD5 hash is built off all columns and is to be used with available primary and/or business keys included in the respective file. Is included to simplify any delta loading processes during file imports. row-by-row validation check using the hash bytes MD5 function to compare every character between the source and target tables. ACTION_GRPCHARClaim Action Group

ADD_DATEDate Record AddedDATEThe date the record was added to HPMMIS. Display format is MMM DD, YYYY where MMM is a 3 character abbreviation for the month, DD is a one or two digit number of the day, and YYYY is a four digit year.
ADD_TIMETime Record AddedCHARThe time the record was added to HPMMIS.
ADD_USERRecord Added UserCHARRecord Added User
CASE_NOCase NumberVARCHARClaim action case number

T_CL_ACTIVITY
Column NameColumn AliasData TypeDescription
ACTVTY_CDVARCHARThis field contains the HCPCS or NDC submitted on the encounter or claim. For a HCFA 1500 HCPCS the display will be in the first five (5) positions of this field, for Form C (Universal Drug Form) the display will be the entire eleven (11) positions of the field
ACTVTY_TYPCHARClaim Activity Type
AHCCCS_IDAHCCCS_IDNUMBERThe unique identifier of an individual member.
BILL_AMTBilled AmountNUMBERClaim billed amount
BILL_AMT_XCHARClaim Bill Amount
CLM_NOClaim NumberCHARA unique identifier for an individual claim or encounter assigned by MQD. The claim number is connected to the paid amount for the entire set of services and not for each individual service. It is used in the Data Warehouse for UB forms only. This number consists of the Julian date (digits 1-5), the batch number (digits 6-9), and the sequence number (digits 10-12).
CMT_NOVARCHARComment Number
CRNClaim Reference Number (CRN)NUMBERThe unique identifier of a separately billed service on a particular claim or encounter submitted on any form type. The first 12 digits are the Claim Number and the last two are the Line Number which references each individual service or product on that bill.
DIAG_1_PTRDiagnosis 1 PointerCHARCode 1 pointer that indicates the priority of diagnosis
DIAG_2_PTRDiagnosis 2 PointerNUMBERCode 2 pointer that indicates the priority of diagnosis
DIAG_3_PTRDiagnosis 3 PointerNUMBERCode 3 pointer that indicates the priority of diagnosis
DIAG_4_PTRDiagnosis 4 PointerNUMBERCode 4 pointer that indicates the priority of diagnosis

DIAG_CD_2Diagnosis Code 2NUMBERClaim Diagnosis Code Secondary
DIAG_CD_3Diagnosis Code 3NUMBERClaim Diagnosis Code Third

DIAG_POA_2Diagnosis 2 Present on AdmissionCHARSecondary Diagnosis present upon admission

DIAG_POA_4Diagnosis 4 Present on AdmissionCHARForth Diagnosis present upon admission

DME_PURCH_PRICEDurable Medical Equipment (DME) Purchase PriceNUMBERDurable Medical Equipment Claim Purchase Price
DME_RENTAL_PRICEDurable Medical Equipment (DME) Rental Price NUMBERDurable Medical Equipment Claim Rental Price

EMG_INDVARCHAREmergency Indicator
FORM_TYPForm TypeCHARA code that represents the type of form used for a claim. There are six different form types with an alpha indicator that are categorized into 1500, UB04, ADA, and NCPDP national forms
LENGTH_MED_NECLength of Medical NecessityNUMBERThe number of days the claim covers
LN_NOLine NumberVARCHARLine Number
LN_STALine StatusCHARLine Status
md5_hashVARCHARThe MD5 hash is built off all columns and is to be used with available primary and/or business keys included in the respective file. Is included to simplify any delta loading processes during file imports. row-by-row validation check using the hash bytes MD5 function to compare every character between the source and target tables. The primary objective, apart from confirming matching data, was to identify special characters that would cause issues with data loads

RCVD_PRV_IDNUMBERReceived Provider ID for the claim

REV_CDRevenue CodeNUMBERA code that represents the type of hospital services charged on the claim.

ADMITTING_DXAdmitting DiagnosisCHARThis diagnosis code is provided by a health care practitioner when a patient is admitted to a hospital. This code is chosen before any medical testing has been performed to determine the true medical issue. This code may be thought of as a patient's stated reason for seeking care.

ADMITTING_PTRCHARDiagnosis pointer at arrival

ADD_USERRecord Added UserCHARRecord Added User
ADJU_STAAdjudication StatusCHARA code that represents the progress of the adjudication process. The data warehouse only contains finalized claims, so valid values are: A - Approved 6 - Administrative Denial D - Denied V - Void R - Replace null
ATND_PRV_IDAttending Provider IDVARCHARThis number is a unique identifier assigned by MQD during provider registration that identifies a person or entity that contracts with MQD or a contractor for the provision of covered services.
BILL_PRV_IDBilling Provider IDCHARThis number is a unique identifier assigned by MQD during provider registration that identifies a person or entity that contracts with MQD or a contractor for the provision of covered services. In this instance, it identifies the provider who billed for a service.
BILL_PRV_LOCBilling Provider LocationCHARBilling provider location
BILL_PRV_TINBilling Provider Tax Identification Number (TIN)CHARA unique tax identifier number of the billing provider as reported on a claim or encounter. Also referred to as TIN. This may contain the provider’s current or historic tax ID number. Every provider has one or more tax ID numbers attached to their registration record in HPMMIS.
CLM_NOClaim NumberCHARA unique identifier for an individual claim or encounter assigned by MQD. The claim number is connected to the paid amount for the entire set of services and not for each individual service. It is used in the Data Warehouse for UB forms only. This number consists of the Julian date (digits 1-5), the batch number (digits 6-9), and the sequence number (digits 10-12).
FACL_PRV_IDFacility Provider IDVARCHARFacility Provider ID
FORM_TYPForm TypeCHARA code that represents the type of form used for a claim. There are six different form types with an alpha indicator that are categorized into 1500, UB04, ADA, and NCPDP national forms
IHS_638_INDIHS 638 IndicatorCHARIHS Ind ihs
IHS_PRV_INDIndian Health Service (IHS) Provider IndicatorCHARIndicates whether the provider is under the Indian Health Service or not.
md5_hashVARCHARThe MD5 hash is built off all columns and is to be used with available primary and/or business keys included in the respective file. The claim number is connected to the paid amount for the entire set of services and not for each individual service. It is used in the Data Warehouse for UB forms only. This number consists of the Julian date (digits 1-5), the batch number (digits 6-9), and the sequence number (digits 10-12).
CRNClaim Reference Number (CRN)CHARThe unique identifier of a separately billed service on a particular claim or encounter submitted on any form type. The first 12 digits are the Claim Number and the last two are the Line Number which references each individual service or product on that bill.
LN_NOLine NumberCHARLine Number
md5_hashVARCHARThe MD5 hash is built off all columns and is to be used with available primary and/or business keys included in the respective file. Is included to simplify any delta loading processes during file imports. row-by-row validation check using the hash bytes MD5 function to compare every character between the source and target tables. The primary objective, apart from confirming matching data, was to identify special characters that would cause issues with data loads
NUM_CKCHARCheck Number
ODS_LOAD_DATEODS Load DateDATEODS Load Date
QTYNUMBERQuantity
TYPCHARType

CUT_REASONCutback ReasonCHARExplains why inpatient days have been adjusted for a given tier. C (cutback) - inpatient days are reduced and applied to a different tier P (put back) - inpatient days are increased and subtracted from a different tier.

The claim number is connected to the paid amount for the entire set of services and not for each individual service. It is used in the Data Warehouse for UB forms only. This number consists of the Julian date (digits 1-5), the batch number (digits 6-9), and the sequence number (digits 10-12).
CRNClaim Reference Number (CRN)CHARThe unique identifier of a separately billed service on a particular claim or encounter submitted on any form type. The first 12 digits are the Claim Number and the last two are the Line Number which references each individual service or product on that bill.
ENC_CLM_INDEncounter Claim IndicatorCHARIndicates either a claim (C) or encounter (E).
ERR_CDCHARError Code
MATCHED_CRNCHARMatch Claim Reference Number
md5_hashVARCHARThe MD5 hash is built off all columns and is to be used with available primary and/or business keys included in the respective file. Is included to simplify any delta loading processes during file imports. row-by-row validation check using the hash bytes MD5 function to compare every character between the source and target tables. The primary objective, apart from confirming matching data, was to identify special characters that would cause issues with data loads

CUT_REASCutback ReasonCHARExplains why inpatient days have been adjusted for a given tier. C (cutback) - inpatient days are reduced and applied to a different tier P (put back) - inpatient days are increased and subtracted from a different tier.

Column NameColumn AliasData TypeDescription
ADJ_VOID_REASCHARAdjusted Void Reason
ADJU_LVLAdjudication LevelCHARThe severity of the Adjudication
ADJU_STAAdjudication StatusCHARA code that represents the progress of the adjudication process. The data warehouse only contains finalized claims, so valid values are: A - Approved 6 - Administrative Denial D - Denied V - Void R - Replace null
AHCCCS_IDAHCCCS_IDCHARThe unique identifier of an individual member.
BEN_CATBenefit CategoryCHARMedical Benefits Category code
BIL_AMTBilled AmountNUMBERMedical details billed amount
CAP_RATE_CDCHARCapitation Rate Code
CATEG_INDCategory IndicatorCHARMedical Category Indicator
CLM_COSClaim Category of ServiceCHARA code that represents a grouping of services as defined in PMMIS.
CLM_NOClaim NumberCHARA unique identifier for an individual claim or encounter assigned by MQD. The claim number is connected to the paid amount for the entire set of services and not for each individual service. It is used in the Data Warehouse for UB forms only. This number consists of the Julian date (digits 1-5), the batch number (digits 6-9), and the sequence number (digits 10-12).
CLM_TYPClaim TypeCHARA code that represents the different claims that can be submitted.
CLN_CLM_DATClean Claim DateDATEThe latest date the claim passed all edits in PMMIS. Display format is MMM DD, YYYY where MMM is a 3 character abbreviation for the month, DD is a one or two digit number of the day, and YYYY is a four digit year. The billing date for the claim.
CN1_CODECN1 CodeCHARA code that represents the type of contract the payer has with the provider. Not applicable for Claims.
CRNClaim Reference Number (CRN)CHARThe unique identifier of a separately billed service on a particular claim or encounter submitted on any form type. The first 12 digits are the Claim Number and the last two are the Line Number which references each individual service or product on that bill.
CRS_INDChildren's Rehabilitation Services (CRS) IndicatorCHARChild Rehabilitation Service Medical details
CTRT_TYPContract TypeCHARThis field provides the one character code that is associated with the type(s) of contract a health plan holds with MQD. Contract types indicate a particular population or set of services that a health plan may provide.
DAT_REC_ADDEDDate Record AddedDATEThe date the record was added to PMMIS. Display format is MMM DD, YYYY where MMM is a 3 character abbreviation for the month, DD is a one or two digit number of the day, and YYYY is a four digit year.
DNL_REASDenial Reason CodeCHARDenial reason code for claim
DRUG_UNITNUMBERNational Drug Unit Count
ELG_KEY_CDCHAREligibility Key Code
EMG_SVC_INDCHAREmergency service indicator
ENC_CLM_INDEncounter Claim IndicatorCHARIndicates either a claim (C) or encounter (E).
ENT_ID_CDCHAREntity Identifier Code
FAM_PLN_INDFamily Planning IndicatorCHARFamily Planning Indicator
FIRST_ADJU_DATDATEFirst adjudication date
FREQUENCY_CDFrequency CodeCHARFrequency Code
HCPCS_PROC_CDHCPCS Procedure CodeCHARHCPCS Procedure Code
HCPCS_PROC_MOD1HCPCS Procedure Modifier 1CHARHCPCS Mod procedure

HP_PAID_AMTHealth Plan Paid AmountNUMBERHealth Plan Paid Amount
ICD_INDICD IndicatorCHARICD Indicator
IHS_CDIHS CodeCHARIHS Code
IHS_RFRL_INDIndian Health Service (IHS) Referral IndicatorCHARIndian Health Service (IHS) Referral Indicator
JUL_DATJulian DateCHARThe Julian date is embedded in the first five digits of a CRN (YYDDD). A Julian date is the last 2 digits of the year and 3 digits indicating the day of the year (001-366). This field contains a calendar date format MM/DD/YYYY that corresponds to the Julian date in the Claim Number. It could be used to check claim/encounter submissions on a particular date or lag times (i.e. time between date of service and date of submission).
LAST_MOD_DATLast Modified DateDATELast Modified Date
LAST_MOD_TIMELast Modified TimeCHARLast Modified Time
LAST_MOD_USRLast Modified UserCHARLast Modified User

md5_hashVARCHARThe MD5 hash is built off all columns and is to be used with available primary and/or business keys included in the respective file. Is included to simplify any delta loading processes during file imports. row-by-row validation check using the hash bytes MD5 function to compare every character between the source and target tables. The primary objective, apart from confirming matching data, was to identify special characters that would cause issues with data loads

Column NameColumn AliasData TypeDescription
ADJU_PMT_DATAdjudication Payment dateDATEAdjudication Payment Date
CLM_NOClaim NumberCHARA unique identifier for an individual claim or encounter assigned by MQD. The claim number is connected to the paid amount for the entire set of services and not for each individual service. It is used in the Data Warehouse for UB forms only. This number consists of the Julian date (digits 1-5), the batch number (digits 6-9), and the sequence number (digits 10-12).
CRNClaim Reference Number (CRN)CHARThe unique identifier of a separately billed service on a particular claim or encounter submitted on any form type. The first 12 digits are the Claim Number and the last two are the Line Number which references each individual service or product on that bill.

T_CL_COMMENT_LINE
Column NameColumn AliasData TypeDescription
ADJU_STAAdjudication StatusCHARA code that represents the progress of the adjudication process. The data warehouse only contains finalized claims, so valid values are: A - Approved 6 - Administrative Denial D - Denied V - Void R - Replace null
CLM_NOClaim NumberCHARA unique identifier for an individual claim or encounter assigned by MQD. The claim number is connected to the paid amount for the entire set of services and not for each individual service. It is used in the Data Warehouse for UB forms only. This number consists of the Julian date (digits 1-5), the batch number (digits 6-9), and the sequence number (digits 10-12).
CMT_NOCHARComment Number
COMMENT_LINEComment LineVARCHARComment on the claim
COMMENT_SEQComment SequenceCHARComment sequence of claims
COMMENT_TYPEComment TypeCHARComment type
FORM_TYPForm TypeCHARA code that represents the type of form used for a claim. There are six different form types with an alpha indicator that are categorized into 1500, UB04, ADA, and NCPDP national forms
md5_hashVARCHARThe MD5 hash is built off all columns and is to be used with available primary and/or business keys included in the respective file. Is included to simplify any delta loading processes during file imports. row-by-row validation check using the hash bytes MD5 function to compare every character between the source and target tables. The primary objective, apart from confirming matching data, was to identify special characters that would cause issues with data loads
ODS_LOAD_DATEODS Load DateDATEODS Load Date
PR_TYPProvider TypeCHARProvider Type
PRV_IDProvider IDCHARProvider ID
RENDERING_NPIRendering NPICHARRendering NPI
RENDERING_PR_IDRendering Provider IDCHARThis number is a unique identifier assigned by MQD during provider registration that identifies a person or entity that contracts with MQD or a contractor for the provision of covered services. In this instance, it identifies the provider who rendered a service.
RENDERING_PR_TYPRendering Provider TypeCHARThis two character code is assigned to each MQD registered provider determined by a combination of the license, certification and/or medical degree of the provider that defines the type of provider appearing on an individual claim. In this instance, it represents the type of provider who rendered a service.
T_CL_STATUS
Column NameColumn AliasData TypeDescription
ADJU_STAAdjudication StatusVARCHARA code that represents the progress of the adjudication process. The data warehouse only contains finalized claims, so valid values are: A - Approved 6 - Administrative Denial D - Denied V - Void R - Replace null
CLM_NOClaim NumberNUMBERA unique identifier for an individual claim or encounter assigned by MQD. The claim number is connected to the paid amount for the entire set of services and not for each individual service. It is used in the Data Warehouse for UB forms only. This number consists of the Julian date (digits 1-5), the batch number (digits 6-9), and the sequence number (digits 10-12).
CLM_STA_SEQClaim Status Sequence NumberNUMBERA number indicating how many times the claim cycled through PMMIS before being approved/denied. This numeric field is used only for fee-for-service claims. Encounters will not have a status sequence number.
CLN_CLM_DATClean Claim DateDATEThe latest date the claim passed all edits in PMMIS. Display format is MMM DD, YYYY where MMM is a 3 character abbreviation for the month, DD is a one or two digit number of the day, and YYYY is a four digit year. The billing date for the claim.
CURRENT_REC_INDCurrent Record IndicatorCHARIndicator for Current Record
HDR_STAHeader StatusCHARHeader Status
LOAD_DATLoad DateDATELoad Date
md5_hashVARCHARThe MD5 hash is built off all columns and is to be used with available primary and/or business keys included in the respective file. Is included to simplify any delta loading processes during file imports. row-by-row validation check using the hash bytes MD5 function to compare every character between the source and target tables. The primary objective, apart from confirming matching data, was to identify special characters that would cause issues with data loads
REC_ADD_DATRecord Added DateDATEThe date the data for the record was added to the MQD system.
REC_ADD_TIMRecord Added TimeVARCHARThe time the data for the record was added to the MQD system.
REC_ADD_USRRecord Added UserCHARThe user who added the data for the record to the MQD system.

T_EC_PND_ENC
Column NameColumn AliasData TypeDescription
AHCCCS_IDAHCCCS_IDVARCHARThe unique identifier of an individual member.
CLM_HP_IDClaim Health Plan IDVARCHARThis field shows the ID number of the health plan that paid the claim.
CRNClaim Reference Number (CRN)VARCHARThe unique identifier of a separately billed service on a particular claim or encounter submitted on any form type. The first 12 digits are the Claim Number and the last two are the Line Number which references each individual service or product on that bill.
ENC_CLM_INDEncounter Claim IndicatorVARCHARIndicates either a claim (C) or encounter (E).
FORM_TYPForm TypeVARCHARA code that represents the type of form used for a claim. There are six different form types with an alpha indicator that are categorized into 1500, UB04, ADA, and NCPDP national forms
md5_hashVARCHARThe MD5 hash is built off all columns and is to be used with available primary and/or business keys included in the respective file. Is included to simplify any delta loading processes during file imports. row-by-row validation check using the hash bytes MD5 function to compare every character between the source and target tables. The primary objective, apart from confirming matching data, was to identify special characters that would cause issues with data loads
ODS_LOAD_DATEODS Load DateDATEODS Load Date
PRCS_LOC_CDProcess Location CodeVARCHARProcess Location Code
PRCS_LOC_DATProcess Location DateDATEProcess Location Date
PRI_AHCCCS_IDPrimary AHCCCS_IDVARCHARThe unique identifier of an individual member.
SER_PR_IDServicing Provider IDVARCHARServicing Provider ID
STA_EFF_DATStatus Effective DateDATEStatus Effective Date

T_EC_DRUG_PAYOR
Column NameColumn AliasData TypeDescription
AMT_PAIDNUMBERAmount paid
CLM_NOClaim NumberCHARA unique identifier for an individual claim or encounter assigned by MQD. The claim number is connected to the paid amount for the entire set of services and not for each individual service. It is used in the Data Warehouse for UB forms only. This number consists of the Julian date (digits 1-5), the batch number (digits 6-9), and the sequence number (digits 10-12).
CO_PMTCopaymentNUMBERRX copayment amount
COINSCoinsuranceNUMBERDoes recipient have coinsurance
DEDUCTNUMBERClaim Deductible
DISP_FEE_PDDispense Fee PaidNUMBERPayer RX dispense fee paid
ENC_CLM_INDEncounter Claim IndicatorCHARIndicates either a claim (C) or encounter (E).
INGRED_COST_PDIngredient Cost PaidNUMBERIngredient Cost Paid
ODS_LOAD_DATEODS Load DateDATEODS Load Date
OTH_CVG_PYR_TYPOther Coverage Payer TypeCHAROther Coverage Payer Type
OTH_PYR_INDCHAROther Payer Indicator
PAYER_ALLOW_AMTPayer Allowed AmountNUMBERPayer Allowed Amount
PYR_DATDATEPayer Date
PYR_PRI_IDCHARPayer Primary ID
T_EC_OVRD_ERR
Column NameColumn AliasData TypeDescription
BAT_NUMBatch Number?CHAREncounters Override Error Batch Number
CRNClaim Reference Number (CRN)CHARThe unique identifier of a separately billed service on a particular claim or encounter submitted on any form type. The first 12 digits are the Claim Number and the last two are the Line Number which references each individual service or product on that bill.
DAT_REC_ADDEDDate Record AddedDATEThe date the record was added to PMMIS. Display format is MMM DD, YYYY where MMM is a 3 character abbreviation for the month, DD is a one or two digit number of the day, and YYYY is a four digit year.
DOC_NUMDocument NumberCHARMedical claim document number
ERR_CDCHARError Code
ERR_CD_DESCVARCHARError Code Description
JUL_DATJulian DateCHARThe Julian date is embedded in the first five digits of a CRN (YYDDD). A Julian date is the last 2 digits of the year and 3 digits indicating the day of the year (001-366). This field contains a calendar date format MM/DD/YYYY that corresponds to the Julian date in the Claim Number. It could be used to check claim/encounter submissions on a particular date or lag times (i.e. time between date of service and date of submission).
LAST_MOD_DATLast Modified DateDATELast Modified Date
LAST_MOD_TIMELast Modified TimeCHARLast Modified Time
LAST_MOD_USRLast Modified UserCHARLast Modified User
LINE_NUMLine NumberCHARLine Number
md5_hashVARCHARThe MD5 hash is built off all columns and is to be used with available primary and/or business keys included in the respective file. Is included to simplify any delta loading processes during file imports. row-by-row validation check using the hash bytes MD5 function to compare every character between the source and target tables. The primary objective, apart from confirming matching data, was to identify special characters that would cause issues with data loads

OVRD_RSNCHAROverride Reason
OVRD_RSN_DESCVARCHAROverride Reason Description

PR_IDProvider IDCHARProvider ID

REC_TYPRecord TypeCHARPre-Transfer Base Payment - This is populated with the DRG Base Payment. Same value as DRG Base Payment,
RENDERING_PR_IDRendering Provider IDCHARThis number is a unique identifier assigned by MQD during provider registration that identifies a person or entity that contracts with MQD or a contractor for the provision of covered services. In this instance, it identifies the provider who rendered a service.
RENDERING_PR_NPIRendering Provider NPICHARThis numeric field shows the National Provider ID of a provider who is indicated as the rendering professional on a specific claim.
RENDERING_PR_TYPRendering Provider TypeCHARThis two character code is assigned to each MQD registered provider determined by a combination of the license, certification and/or medical degree of the provider that defines the type of provider appearing on an individual claim. In this instance, it represents the type of provider who rendered a service.
SEQ_NOSequence NumberCHARSequence Number
T_EC_CRN_ERR
Column NameColumn AliasData TypeDescription
CRNClaim Reference Number (CRN)CHARThe unique identifier of a separately billed service on a particular claim or encounter submitted on any form type. The first 12 digits are the Claim Number and the last two are the Line Number which references each individual service or product on that bill.
EC_NUMCHAREncounter Number
ERR_CDCHARError Code
ERR_DATEDATEError Date
ERR_TIMECHARError Time
FORM_TYPForm TypeCHARA code that represents the type of form used for a claim. There are six different form types with an alpha indicator that are categorized into 1500, UB04, ADA, and NCPDP national forms
HP_IDHealth Plan IDCHARHealth Plan ID
LINE_NUMLine NumberCHARLine Number
md5_hashVARCHARThe MD5 hash is built off all columns and is to be used with available primary and/or business keys included in the respective file. Is included to simplify any delta loading processes during file imports. row-by-row validation check using the hash bytes MD5 function to compare every character between the source and target tables. The primary objective, apart from confirming matching data, was to identify special characters that would cause issues with data loads
ODS_LOAD_DATEODS Load DateDATEODS Load Date
PRCS_LOC_CDProcess Location CodeCHARProcess Location Code
SER_PR_IDServicing Provider IDCHARServicing Provider ID

CRNClaim Reference Number (CRN)CHARThe unique identifier of a separately billed service on a particular claim or encounter submitted on any form type. The first 12 digits are the Claim Number and the last two are the Line Number which references each individual service or product on that bill.

HPMMIS_ADJU_STACHARHPMMIS state adjudication Status
INPUT_MODEInput ModeCHARA code that represents the how the encounter was submitted and if was paid or denied.
md5_hashVARCHARThe MD5 hash is built off all columns and is to be used with available primary and/or business keys included in the respective file. Is included to simplify any delta loading processes during file imports. row-by-row validation check using the hash bytes MD5 function to compare every character between the source and target tables. DX_GROUP_DESCRnvarcharThis field provides a description for a particular group code as part of a general classification system for ICD9 diseases and illnesses, national pharmaceutical codes, and dental procedure codes. There are a total of 21 code categories. The first 19 categories describe diseases and injuries, group number 20 are the pharmacy national drug codes, and group number 21 is used for dental procedure codes.

GNI_INDdate

GNR_CDGeneric Drug CodedateClassification of a drug according to its chemical composition
GNR_DRUG_INDGeneric Drug CodedateClassification of a drug according to its chemical composition

INNOVchar
LAST_MOD_DATLast Modified DatevarcharThe date that the record was modified.
LBLDrug Labeler CodevarcharThe name of a product labeler or a prescription legend drug
LBLRIDLabeler IDvarcharThe manufacturer of the NDC
LMT1Limit 1varcharThe maximum number of times a procedure code can be performed or a drug can be dispensed
LMT2Limit 2varcharThe maximum number of times frequency 2 can be performed or a drug can be dispensed

NDC_ADD_DATNDC Add Date charDate the NDC was added to the database
NDC_REUSE_DATNDS Reuse DatecharDate the replacement ndc was added to the database
NDCGI1_INDchar
OBSDTECObsolete DatedateThis data is supplied by FirstDatabank to indicate what date drug has been made obsolete. AHCCCS ADDS ANOTHER 3 YEARS TO THE DATE TO ALLOW FOR SHELF LIFE.
PHR_ITMPharmacy ItemdateThe national drug code (ndc) of the given drug or product. The first five digits of the ndc indicate the manufacturer, the middle four digits indicate the type of a drug, and the last two digits represent the quantity
PHR_ITM_STAPharmacy Item StatusdateInitial pharmacy item status is "p" (pending). It become "c" (complete) when "rf-phr-cvg" (coverage), "rf-phr-pa" (prior authorization), "phr-prc" (pricing) and "rf-phr-item" (pharmacy item) records are created for this pharmacy item
PKG_QTYPackage QuantitynvarcharThe package quantity (may be liquid)
PRR_PHR_ITMPrior Pharmacy ItemdateThe medical item code that was previously used for this product
REC_ADDED_DATRecord Added DatecharThe date the record was added to the database
REFL_NUMNumber of RefillsnvarcharThe code indicating the allowable number of refills for a specific prescription
REPL_NDCReplacement (NDC) Pharmacy ItemcharThe NDC of the pharmacy item which replaced this item
RI_CVG_CDReinsurance Coverage CodecharIndicates whether or not the code is covered by reinsurance.
RI_TYPReinsurance TypecharA code that indicates what type of reinsurance may apply
SEXSex CodecharIndicates if the diagnosis code applies to males only (m), females only (f), or either sex (blanks)
STA_CDStatus CodenvarcharThe status of the site code entry.
STD_PKG_INDStandard Package IndicatorIndicates whether or not the pharmacy item comes in a standard package
STER_INDSterilization IndicatorIndicates whether or not the code is related to sterilization
STRNStrength CodeA code idetnifying the strength of a specific drug
THP_CLSTherapeutic ClassThe therapeutic class code.
TOP_DRUGTop 200 Drug IndicatorRanking number indicating drug popularity

TYPE_CDType code
T_CDE_DIAG
Column NameColumn AliasData TypeDescription
DIAG_CDDiagnosis CodenvarcharThe full six characters of the diagnosis code for a medical condition
DIAG_CD_DESCDiagnosis Code DescriptioncharThe description of the full six characters of the diagnosis code for a medical condition
DIAG_CD_TECH_DESCDiagnosis Code Technical DescriptionnvarcharThe technical description of the full six characters of the diagnosis code for a medical condition
DX_GROUPDiagnosis Group CodecharThe Diagnosis Group Code provides a general classification system for ICD9 diseases and illnesses, national pharmaceutical codes, and dental procedure codes. There are a total of 21 code categories. The first 19 categories describe diseases and injuries, group number 20 are the pharmacy national drug codes, and group number 21 is used for dental procedure codes
DX_GROUP_DESCRDiagnosis Group DescriptioncharThis field provides a description for a particular group code as part of a general classification system for ICD9 diseases and illnesses, national pharmaceutical codes, and dental procedure codes. There are a total of 21 code categories. The first 19 categories describe diseases and injuries, group number 20 are the pharmacy national drug codes, and group number 21 is used for dental procedure codes.
ICD_INDICD IndicatorcharIdentifies which version of ICD codes is being reported.
T_CDE_DIAG_TST
Column NameColumn AliasData TypeDescription
DIAG_CDDiagnosis Code charThe full six characters of the diagnosis code for a medical condition
DIAG_CD_DESCDiagnosis Code DescriptioncharThe description of the full six characters of the diagnosis code for a medical condition
DIAG_CD_TECH_DESCDiagnosis Code Technical DescriptionnvarcharThe technical description of the full six characters of the diagnosis code for a medical condition
DX_GROUPDiagnosis GroupcharThe Diagnosis Group Code provides a general classification system for ICD9 diseases and illnesses, national pharmaceutical codes, and dental procedure codes. There are a total of 21 code categories. The first 19 categories describe diseases and injuries, group number 20 are the pharmacy national drug codes, and group number 21 is used for dental procedure codes
DX_GROUP_DESCRDiagnosis Group DescriptioncharThis field provides a description for a particular group code as part of a general classification system for ICD9 diseases and illnesses, national pharmaceutical codes, and dental procedure codes. There are a total of 21 code categories. The first 19 categories describe diseases and injuries, group number 20 are the pharmacy national drug codes, and group number 21 is used for dental procedure codes.
ICD_INDICD IndicatornvarcharIdentifies which version of ICD codes is being reported.
T_CDE_DIAG_CD_METH
Column NameColumn AliasData TypeDescription
DIAG_CD_METHDiagnosis Coding MethodnvarcharA code that designates the diagnostic classification in which a specific diagnosis belongs.
DIAG_CD_METH_DESCDiagnosis Coding Method DescriptionnvarcharA description of the code that designates the diagnostic classification in which a specific diagnosis belongs.
DTE_BEGINBegin DatedateEffective begin date of the diganosis coding method.
DTE_ENDEffective End DatecharEffective end date of the diganosis coding method.
T_CDE_DIAG_CLASS
Column NameColumn AliasData TypeDescription
DIAG_CLS_CDDiagnosis Classification CodenvarcharClassification code used to group diagnosis codes with similar characteristics.
DIAG_CLS_CD_DESCDiagnosis Classification Code DescriptioncharA description of the classification code used to group diagnosis codes with similar characteristics.

DIAG_SURG_CDDiagnosis Surgery Combination CodenvarcharDiagnosis Surgery Combination Code
DIAG_SURG_CD_DESCDiagnosis Surgery Combination Code DescriptioncharDiagnosis Surgery Combination Code Description

ICD_INDICD IndicatornvarcharIdentifies which version of ICD codes is being reported.
ICD_PROC_CDProcedure CodenvarcharA CPT or HCPCS code referring to the service or product provided on the detail line.
ICD_PROC_DESCProcedure Code DescriptioncharA description of the service or product provided as identified in the Procedure Code field.
ICD_PROC_TECH_DESCProcedure Code Technical DescriptionnvarcharProcedure Code Technical Description
T_CDE_PROC
Column NameColumn AliasData TypeDescription
ICD_INDICD IndicatorcharIdentifies which version of ICD codes is being reported.
PROC_CDProcedure CodecharCodes indicating Procedures on claims and encounters Authorized procedure code. HCPCPS (HCFA common procedure coding system) codes are one letter followed by four digits; CPT (current procedure terminology) codes are five digits
PROC_CD_DESCProcedure Code DescriptioncharA description of the authorized procedure code. HCPCPS (HCFA common procedure coding system) codes are one letter followed by four digits; CPT (current procedure terminology) codes are five digits

Column NameColumn AliasData TypeDescription

ICD9_PROC_DESCProcedure Code DescriptiondateA description of the service or product provided as identified in the Procedure Code field.
ICD9_PROC_TECH_DESCProcedure Code Technical DescriptiondateProcedure Code Technical Description

STAT_DESCTransaction Status DescriptionnvarcharA description of the code indicating the status of the transaction.
T_CDE_STAT_EMPLOYMENT
Column NameColumn AliasData TypeDescription
STAT_EMP_CDEmployment Status CodecharA code indicating the status of a Recipient's employment.
STAT_EMP_DESCEmployment Status Code DescriptioncharA description of the code indicating the status of a Recipient's employment.
T_CDE_STATE
Column NameColumn AliasData TypeDescription
STATE_CDState CodenvarcharState Code
STATE_CD_DESCState Code DescriptionA description of the code indicating the state of ??
T_CDE_NPPES_STATE
Column NameColumn AliasData TypeDescription
STATE_NAMEState NameState Name
STATE_RFRNC_CDState Reference CodeState Reference Code
STATE_TYPE_CDState Type CodeState Type Code
T_CDE_RI_TRANS_STAGE
Column NameColumn AliasData TypeDescription
STG_TYPReinsurance Transplant StageContains reinsurance stage type description, effective dates, stage sequencing. It performs a similar function for RI-CASE-STG as RI-CASE-TYO does for a RI-CASE
STG_TYP_DESCReinsurance Transplant Stage DescriptionA description of the reinsurance transplant stage
T_CDE_SUBCAP
Column NameColumn AliasData TypeDescription
SUBCAP_CDSupcapitation Code (Provider Contract Code; HP-PR-AFL uses this as: CONTRACT INDICATOR)A code the indicated the Health Plan's contracted relationship with the Provider and the type of financial arrangements the Health Plan has with the Provider.
SUBCAP_CD_DESCSupcapitation Code Description (Provider Contract Code Description)A description of the code that defines the Health Plan's contracted relationship with the Provider and the type of financial arrangements the Health Plan has with the Provider.
T_CDE_UR_SYS_TYPE
Column NameColumn AliasData TypeDescription
SURS_TYPUtilization Review System Type CodeType of utilization review (UR) system used by provider.
SURS_TYP_DESCUtilization Review System Type DescriptionA description of the type of utilization review (UR) system used by provider.
T_CDE_TAX_ID_TYP
Column NameColumn AliasData TypeDescription
TAX_ID_DESCTax ID DescriptionA description of the code that indicates whether the ProviderTax ID is a Social Security Number (S) or a Tax ID Number (T).
TAX_ID_TYPTax ID TypeIndicates a provider's type of tax ID as in a code that indicates whether the Tax ID is a Social Security Number (S) or a Tax ID Number (T).
T_CDE_CLASS_THERAPEUTIC
Column NameColumn AliasData TypeDescription
THERAP_CDTherapeutic Class CodeCode indicating the Therapeutic class.
THERAP_CD_DESCTherapeutic Class Code DescriptionA description of the code indicating the Therapeutic class.
T_CDE_TIER
Column NameColumn AliasData TypeDescription
TIER_CDTier CodeCode that identifies the tier assigned.
TIER_CD_DESCTier Code DescriptionA description of the code that identifies the tier assigned.
T_CDE_PR_AUD_TRANS_CAT
Column NameColumn AliasData TypeDescription
TRANS_CATTransaction Category
TRANS_CAT_DESCRTransaction Category Description
T_CDE_TRIBE
Column NameColumn AliasData TypeDescription
TRIBE_CDTribe CodeCode that denotes the tribe a recipient belongs to. Tribe ID is given to PMMIS by LEDS/CATS for Long Term Care recipients.
TRIBE_CD_DESCTribe Code DescriptionA description of the code that denotes the tribe a recipient belongs to.
T_CDE_TSN
Column NameColumn AliasData TypeDescription
TSNTape Supplier NumberTape Supplier Number
TSN_DESCTape Suppler Number DescriptionTape Suppler Number Description

EVV

T_EVV_CLIENT_GENERAL
Column NameColumn AliasData TypeDescription
ACCOUNTnvarcharSandata account number. This number is generated by EVV as the Provider Account Number. This value will be a minimum of 4 digits (may be zero padded) to a maximum of 10 digits
CLIENTBIRTHDATEdateDate of birth of the client
CLIENTCONTACTADDRESSLINE1nvarcharStreet address of the client
CLIENTCONTACTADDRESSLINE2nvarcharSecond line of the street address of the client
CLIENTCONTACTCITYnvarcharCity of the client
CLIENTCONTACTEMAILADDRESSnvarcharEmail address of the client
CLIENTCONTACTFIRSTNAMEnvarcharFirst name of the client
CLIENTCONTACTLASTNAMEnvarcharLast name of the client
CLIENTCONTACTPHONEnvarcharPhone number of the client
CLIENTCONTACTPHONETYPEnvarcharPhone number type of the client (work phone/Home phone etc.)
CLIENTCONTACTSTATEnvarcharState name/ state code of the client
CLIENTCONTACTTYPEnvarcharClient contact type
CLIENTCONTACTZIPnvarcharZip code of the client
CLIENTCOORDINATOREMAILnvarcharEmail address of the client coordinator
CLIENTCUSTOMIDnvarcharAdditional client user-defined identifier. Commonly used to customize the built-in client ID within the system. May be equal to another ID provided.
CLIENTEMAILnvarcharEmail address of the client
CLIENTFIRSTNAMEnvarcharFirst name of the client
CLIENTGENDERnvarcharGender of the client
CLIENTIDnvarcharAssigned client identifier. Note that this value may be used as the client identifier for telephony and MVV when Client ID entry is applicable. This value uniquely identifies the client in the Sandata system.
CLIENTLANGUAGEnvarcharLanguage spoken by the client
CLIENTLASTNAMEnvarcharLast name of the client
CLIENTMARTIALSTATUSnvarcharMarital status of the client
CLIENTMEDICAIDIDnvarcharUnique ID provided by the State Medicaid program to the client.
CLIENTMEDICALRECORDNUMnvarcharClient’s medical record number, if applicable.
CLIENTMIDDLEINITIALnvarcharMiddle initial of the client
CLIENTOTHERIDnvarcharAdditional client user-defined identifier. Commonly used to store client’s ID from another system. This value is used to match the client to an existing record during import.
CLIENTPRIORITYnvarcharIndicates client priority
CLIENTSSNnvarcharSocial Security number assigned to the client
CLIENTSUFFIXnvarcharClient Suffix (e.g. Sr, Jr, III, IV, V (no special characters)).
CLIENTTIMEZONEnvarcharTime zone of the client
COORDINATORnvarcharThe identified assigned to the Client which associates the client to their Coordinators for an employee.
INSERT_DATEdateThe date when the client general information was added to the database
md5_hashvarcharThe MD5 hash is built off all columns and is to be used with available primary and/or business keys included in the respective file. Is included to simplify any delta loading processes during file imports. row-by-row validation check using the hash bytes MD5 function to compare every character between the source and target tables. The primary objective, apart from confirming matching data, was to identify special characters that would cause issues with data loads
MISSINGMEDICAIDIDnvarcharIndicator that a patient is a newborn. If this value is provided, ClientMedicaidID will be ignored and will be valid as null.
PROVIDERASSENTCONTPLANnvarcharIndicator to capture provider’s
assent that the member’s
contingency plan provided will be
reviewed with the member every 90
days and documentation will be
provided.
PROVIDERIDnvarcharUnique identifier for the agency.
UPDATE_DATEdateThe date when the client general information was last updated
T_EVV_PROVIDER_GENERAL
Column NameColumn AliasData TypeDescription
ACCOUNTnvarcharSandata account number. This number is generated by EVV as the Provider Account Number. This value will be a minimum of 4 digits (may be zero padded) to a maximum of 10 digits.
ADDRESSCITYnvarcharCity associated with the provider
ADDRESSLINE1nvarcharProvider’s street address as supplied by the State.
ADDRESSLINE2nvarcharSecond line of provider’s street address
ADDRESSSTATEnvarcharState name associated with the provider
ADDRESSZIPnvarcharZip code associated with the provider
AGENCYEMAILnvarcharEmail id corresponding to the provider of service
AGENCYPHONEnvarcharPhone number corresponding to the provider of service
COUNTYnvarcharCounty of the provider
INSERT_DATEdateDate when the provider general information was added to the data base
md5_hashvarcharThe MD5 hash is built off all columns and is to be used with available primary and/or business keys included in the respective file. Is included to simplify any delta loading processes during file imports. row-by-row validation check using the hash bytes MD5 function to compare every character between the source and target tables. The primary objective, apart from confirming matching data, was to identify special characters that would cause issues with data loads
PRIMARYCONTACTFIRSTNAMEnvarcharProvider’s first name. For Non-Agency providers, this field will contain the name of the worker/independent contractor. For Agency providers, it will contain the same value as the Account Name column
PRIMARYCONTACTLASTNAMEnvarcharProvider’s last name. For Non-Agency providers, this field will contain the name of the worker/independent contractor. For Agency providers, it will contain the same value as the Account Name column
PROVIDERAPInvarcharProvider API Number.
PROVIDERDATEBEGINdateDate provider account was created.
PROVIDERDOINGBUSINESSASnvarcharAlternate name for the provider
PROVIDERFAXnvarcharFax number associated with the provider
PROVIDERIDnvarcharUnique identifier for the agency.
PROVIDERMEDICAIDIDnvarcharMedicaid Identification number for the provider, as supplied by the State Program.
PROVIDERNAMEnvarcharProvider’s Name. For Non-Agency providers, this field will contain the name of the worker/independent contractor. For Agency providers, it will contain the same value as the Account Name column
PROVIDERNPInvarcharProvider NPI (National Provider Identifier) Number
PROVIDERQUALIFIERnvarcharIdentifier being sent as the unique
identifier for the provider
PROVIDERREQUIREAUTHnvarcharIs an authorization required for billing?
PROVIDERTAXONOMYnvarcharHealth Care Provider Taxonomy code
PROVIDERTIMEZONEnvarcharTime zone of the provider
SOURCEDBYALTEVVnvarcharThis field indicates if the provider record was provided by a Third Party Vendor (via AltEVVinterface). If N, this means that the provider record was provided by the primary customer provider import files. Possible values “Y” or “N”.
SSNnvarcharSocial Security number of the care giver
SUSPENSIONDATEdateService suspension date
TAXIDnvarcharTax ID number
TERMINATIONDATEdateTermination date when users will lose all access to the account. If the termination date is in the past, all users are suspended from access to Sandata EVV. If the termination date is removed post the suspension date but prior to the termination date, the termination date will be removed from the account and it will no longer be subject to termination. If the termination date is removed after the account is terminated, the termination date will be removed from the account.
VENDORIDnvarcharThe identifier specifying the source of the EVV data for the provider. Supplied if the program includes multiple EVV Vendors.
T_EVV_VISIT_GENERAL
Column NameColumn AliasData TypeDescription
ACCOUNTnvarcharSandata account number. This number is generated by EVV as the Provider Account Number. This value will be a minimum of 4 digits (may be zero padded) to a maximum of 10 digits.
ACTDURATIONnumericActual, calculated duration (Call Out – Call In) in Minutes.
ADJBEGINNINGDATETIMEdateAdjusted in date/time if entered manually. Otherwise the actual date/time received.
ADJDURATIONnumericAdjusted, calculated duration (Adj Call Out -Adj Call In) in Minutes
ADJENDDATETIMEdateAdjusted out date/time if entered manually. Otherwise the actual date/time received.
BILLTIMEnumericBillable visit duration, expressed in seconds (4800s/3600 = 1.33hrs
BILLVISITnvarcharIf the visit is going to be billed. True / False
CALLINDATETIMEdateDate/Time stamp when the call-in/check-in occurred, starting the visit
CALLOUTDATETIMEdateDate/Time stamp when the call-out/check-out occurred, starting the visit
CLIENTIDnvarcharUnique client identifier in EVV within each account
CLIENTSIGNATUREAVAILABLEnvarcharThe actual signature will not be transferred. The originating system will be considered the system of record.
CLIENTVERIFIEDSERVICEnvarcharIndicates whether the client verified the service
CLIENTVERIFIEDTASKSnvarcharIndicates whether the client verified the tasks
CLIENTVERIFIEDTIMESnvarcharIndicates whether the client verified the time of the service
CLIENTVOICERECORDINGnvarcharThe actual voice recording will not be transferred. The originating system will be considered the system of record.
CLIENTVOICEVERIFICATIONnvarcharIf voice verification is in use, did the client’s voice recording match the enrollment information.
CURESREQUIREDnvarcharIndicates that service provided requires EVV.
EMPLOYEEIDnvarcharUnique employee identifier. This value uniquely identifies the employee in the Sandata system.
EMPVOICEVERIFICATIONnvarcharIf voice verification is in use, did the employee’s voice recording match the enrollment information. True / False
GROUPCODEnvarcharThis visit was part of a group visit. Group Code is used to reassemble all members of the group. Note that Alternate EVV vendors may not supply this value.
INSERTDATEdateDate when general information regarding the visit was added to the EVV system
md5_hashvarcharThe MD5 hash is built off all columns and is to be used with available primary and/or business keys included in the respective file. Is included to simplify any delta loading processes during file imports. row-by-row validation check using the hash bytes MD5 function to compare every character between the source and target tables. The primary objective, apart from confirming matching data, was to identify special characters that would cause issues with data loads
MEMOnvarcharThe free form memo field from Sandata EVV or 3rd Party System.
MODIFIER1nvarcharProcedure Code associated with the type of service provided to the client. If the 5 character HCPCS code is followed by the underscore character and two additional digits, this value will map to the HCPCS provided along with one or more modifiers. Up to 4 of these are allowed.
MODIFIER2nvarcharProcedure Code associated with the type of service provided to the client. If the 5 character HCPCS code is followed by the underscore character and two additional digits, this value will map to the HCPCS provided along with one or more modifiers. Up to 4 of these are allowed.
MODIFIER3nvarcharProcedure Code associated with the type of service provided to the client. If the 5 character HCPCS code is followed by the underscore character and two additional digits, this value will map to the HCPCS provided along with one or more modifiers. Up to 4 of these are allowed.
MODIFIER4nvarcharProcedure Code associated with the type of service provided to the client. If the 5 character HCPCS code is followed by the underscore character and two additional digits, this value will map to the HCPCS provided along with one or more modifiers. Up to 4 of these are allowed.
PAYERIDnvarcharSandata EVV assigned ID for the
payer.
PAYERPROGRAMnvarcharIf applicable, the program to which this visit belongs.
PAYTIMEnumericMinutes that are going to be paid.
PROCEDURECODEnvarcharThis is the billable procedure code
which would be mapped to the
associated service.
PROVIDERIDnvarcharUnique identifier for the agency.
TIMEZONEnvarcharVisit time zone.
UPDATEDATEdateDate when general information was last updated in the evv system
VISITCANCELLEDINDICATORnvarcharTrue/false – if omitted visits are requested and/or if a visit that has already been sent has been invalidated for some reason, this indicator would be sent as true.
VISITKEYnvarcharVisit identifier in the Sandata system. Note that the same Visit Key can be sent multiple times over the course of different exports. Subsequent Visit Keys are updates to the prior visit.
VISITOTHERIDnvarcharVisit identifier in the external EVV system, if any.
VISITSTATUSnvarcharStatus of the visit as calculated by the Aggregator.
T_EVV_CLIENT_ADDR
Column NameColumn AliasData TypeDescription
ADDRESSIDnvarcharAddress Identification number for the address where the client resides/receives services
CLIENTADDRESSLINE1nvarcharStreet address of the client
CLIENTADDRESSLINE2nvarcharSecond line of the street address of the client
CLIENTADDRESSTYPEnvarcharAddress Type corresponding to the address where the client resides/receives services
CLIENTCITYnvarcharCity corresponding to the address where the client resides/receives services
CLIENTCOUNTYnvarcharCounty corresponding to the address where the client resides/receives services
CLIENTIDnvarcharUnique client identifier in EVV within each account
CLIENTSTATEnvarcharState corresponding to the address where the client resides/receives services
CLIENTZIPnvarcharZip Code corresponding to the address where the client resides/receives services
INSERT_DATEdateThe date when the client address was added to the database
md5_hashvarcharThe MD5 hash is built off all columns and is to be used with available primary and/or business keys included in the respective file. Is included to simplify any delta loading processes during file imports. row-by-row validation check using the hash bytes MD5 function to compare every character between the source and target tables. The primary objective, apart from confirming matching data, was to identify special characters that would cause issues with data loads
PROVIDERIDnvarcharUnique identifier for the agency.
UPDATE_DATEdateThe date when the client address was last updated
