T_EVV_CLIENT_AUTH
Column NameColumn AliasData TypeDescription
AUTHIDnvarcharSandata assigned unique identifier for the payer/program/service mapping.
CASEMANAGEREMAILnvarcharEmail address of the case manager assigned to the client
CASEMANAGERFIRSTNAMEnvarcharFirst Name of the case manager assigned to the client
CASEMANAGERLASTNAMEnvarcharLast Name of the case manager assigned to the client
CLIENTELIGIBILITYDATEBEGINdateDate when the client became eligible for services
CLIENTELIGIBILITYDATEENDdateLast date when the client became eligible for services
CLIENTENDOFCAREDATEdateEnd of Care Date.
CLIENTIDnvarcharAssigned client identifier. Note that this value may be used as the client identifier for telephony and MVV when Client ID entry is applicable. This value uniquely identifies the client in the Sandata system.
CLIENTPAYERIDnvarcharUnique Client ID for the Payer if different from the Client’s Medicaid ID.
CLIENTSTARTOFCAREDATEdateStart of Care Date.
CLIENTSTATUSnvarcharThe client’s current status.
CLIENTSTATUSDATEdateThe date of the last status change. If not provided, current date will be assumed. Entered by Payer.
DIAGNOSISCODEnvarcharThe client’s diagnosis code in ICD-10 format.
INSERT_DATEdateThe date when the client authorization was added to the database
ISPRIMARYnvarcharIndicates if the authorizer is primary
md5_hashvarcharThe MD5 hash is built off all columns and is to be used with available primary and/or business keys included in the respective file. Is included to simplify any delta loading processes during file imports. row-by-row validation check using the hash bytes MD5 function to compare every character between the source and target tables. The primary objective, apart from confirming matching data, was to identify special characters that would cause issues with data loads
MODIFIER1nvarcharProcedure Code associated with the type of service provided to the client. If the 5 character HCPCS code is followed by the underscore character and two additional digits, this value will map to the HCPCS provided along with one or more modifiers. Up to 4 of these are allowed.
MODIFIER2nvarcharProcedure Code associated with the type of service provided to the client. If the 5 character HCPCS code is followed by the underscore character and two additional digits, this value will map to the HCPCS provided along with one or more modifiers. Up to 4 of these are allowed.
MODIFIER3nvarcharProcedure Code associated with the type of service provided to the client. If the 5 character HCPCS code is followed by the underscore character and two additional digits, this value will map to the HCPCS provided along with one or more modifiers. Up to 4 of these are allowed.
MODIFIER4nvarcharProcedure Code associated with the type of service provided to the client. If the 5 character HCPCS code is followed by the underscore character and two additional digits, this value will map to the HCPCS provided along with one or more modifiers. Up to 4 of these are allowed.
PAYERIDnvarcharSandata EVV assigned ID for the
payer.
PAYERPROGRAMnvarcharIf applicable, the program to which this visit belongs.
PAYERREGIONnvarcharIf applicable, the region code in which this client is being provided services.
PAYERSERVICEnvarcharIf applicable, the service to which this client belongs. Generally provided as a HCPCS code.
PROVIDERIDnvarcharUnique identifier for the agency.
T_EVV_VISIT_CLAIMST
Column NameColumn AliasData TypeDescription
BATCHIDnvarcharUnique identifier for the request generated by the payer.
CLIENTMEDICAIDIDnvarcharUnique ID provided by the State Medicaid program to the client.
DETAILLINENUMBERnvarcharDetail Line Number. A sequential and unique line number of each detail line within the claim.
GROUPCODEnvarcharThis visit was part of a group visit. Group Code is used to reassemble all members of the group.
ICNnvarcharAn Internal Control Number (ICN) is a unique, 13-digit identification number assigned to every claim in order to distinguish it from all other claims received by the system.
INSERT_DATEdateDate that the claim status was added to the database
md5_hashvarcharThe MD5 hash is built off all columns and is to be used with available primary and/or business keys included in the respective file. Is included to simplify any delta loading processes during file imports. row-by-row validation check using the hash bytes MD5 function to compare every character between the source and target tables. The primary objective, apart from confirming matching data, was to identify special characters that would cause issues with data loads
MODIFIER1nvarcharProcedure Code associated with the type of service provided to the client. If the 5 character HCPCS code is followed by the underscore character and two additional digits, this value will map to the HCPCS provided along with one or more modifiers. Up to 4 of these are allowed.
MODIFIER2nvarcharProcedure Code associated with the type of service provided to the client. If the 5 character HCPCS code is followed by the underscore character and two additional digits, this value will map to the HCPCS provided along with one or more modifiers. Up to 4 of these are allowed.
MODIFIER3nvarcharProcedure Code associated with the type of service provided to the client. If the 5 character HCPCS code is followed by the underscore character and two additional digits, this value will map to the HCPCS provided along with one or more modifiers. Up to 4 of these are allowed.
MODIFIER4nvarcharProcedure Code associated with the type of service provided to the client. If the 5 character HCPCS code is followed by the underscore character and two additional digits, this value will map to the HCPCS provided along with one or more modifiers. Up to 4 of these are allowed.
RESPONSEDATETIMEdateDate and time response as generated by Sandata
SERVICEnvarcharIf applicable, the service to which this client belongs. Generally provided as a HCPCS code.
TRANSACTIONIDnvarcharUnique identifier for the request generated by the payer.
UNITSnumericUnits requested by and being returned to the adjudication system. For example, for 15 minute units, the maximum expected value is 96 (24 hours @ 4 units per hour).
UPDATE_DATEdateDate the claim status was last updated
VISITENDDATETIMEdateRequested date and time out.
VISITKEYnvarcharVisit identifier in the Sandata system. Note that the same Visit Key can be sent multiple times over the course of different exports. Subsequent Visit Keys are updates to the prior visit.
VISITSTARTDATETIMEdateVisit start date and time
T_EVV_CLIENT_SCHEDULE
Column NameColumn AliasData TypeDescription
BILLRATEnvarcharRate for billing. Provided if rate is specified as part of the schedule received.
CLIENTIDnvarcharAssigned client identifier. Note that this value may be used as the client identifier for telephony and MVV when Client ID entry is applicable. This value uniquely identifies the client in the Sandata system.
CLUSTERCASEFLAGnvarcharCluster case indicator. This is special use.
CONTINGENCYPLANnvarcharIndicator of member’s contingency
plan selected by member. Valid
values include (CODE should be sent
only):
CODE- Description
CP01 - Reschedule within 2 Hours
CP02 - Reschedule within 24 Hours
CP03 - Reschedule within 48 Hours
CP04 - Next Scheduled Visit
CP05 - Non-Paid Caregiver
DISCIPLINEnvarcharType of service provided by the Employee.
EMPLOYEEIDnvarcharUnique employee identifier. This value uniquely identifies the employee in the Sandata system.
INSERT_DATEdateThe date when the client schedule was added to the database
LIVEINCASEnvarchar24 hour live in case. Values are true/false.
md5_hashvarcharThe MD5 hash is built off all columns and is to be used with available primary and/or business keys included in the respective file. Is included to simplify any delta loading processes during file imports. row-by-row validation check using the hash bytes MD5 function to compare every character between the source and target tables. The primary objective, apart from confirming matching data, was to identify special characters that would cause issues with data loads
MODIFIER1nvarcharProcedure Code associated with the type of service provided to the client. If the 5 character HCPCS code is followed by the underscore character and two additional digits, this value will map to the HCPCS provided along with one or more modifiers. Up to 4 of these are allowed.
MODIFIER2nvarcharProcedure Code associated with the type of service provided to the client. If the 5 character HCPCS code is followed by the underscore character and two additional digits, this value will map to the HCPCS provided along with one or more modifiers. Up to 4 of these are allowed.
MODIFIER3nvarcharProcedure Code associated with the type of service provided to the client. If the 5 character HCPCS code is followed by the underscore character and two additional digits, this value will map to the HCPCS provided along with one or more modifiers. Up to 4 of these are allowed.
MODIFIER4nvarcharProcedure Code associated with the type of service provided to the client. If the 5 character HCPCS code is followed by the underscore character and two additional digits, this value will map to the HCPCS provided along with one or more modifiers. Up to 4 of these are allowed.
PAYERIDnvarcharSandata EVV assigned ID for the
payer.
PAYERPROGRAMnvarcharIf applicable, the program to which this visit belongs.
PAYERSERVICEnvarcharIf applicable, the service to which this client belongs. Generally provided as a HCPCS code.
PAYRATEnvarcharRate for payroll. Can have values like 5.043 or 1.23 and should not exceed 5 characters. Decimal point is included in the length.
PROVIDERIDnvarcharUnique identifier for the agency.
RESCHEDULEnvarcharIndicator if schedule is a “reschedule”
SCHEDULEDURATIONnvarcharDuration of activity / scheduled visit. This is difference between end time and start time. In minutes.
SCHEDULEENDTIMEdateActivity / Schedule end date and
time.
SCHEDULEIDnvarcharUnique Identifier for the schedule
record from the source system.
Used to update the schedule in
subsequent transfers.
SCHEDULESTARTDATEdateActivity / Schedule start date and
time.
SCHEDULESTARTTIMEdateActivity / Schedule start date and
time.
SCHEDULETIMEZONEnvarcharSchedule time zone – if different that the client’s default.
UPDATE_DATEdateThe last date when the schedule was updated
VISITTYPEnvarcharUsed for billing. If visit type is set to ‘V’ it means charge by visit.
T_EVV_VISIT_CALLS
Column NameColumn AliasData TypeDescription
CALLASSIGNMENTnvarcharValues: Time In, Time Out, Other
CALLDATETIMEdateDate/Time stamp when the call-in/check-in occurred, starting the visit
CALLKEYnvarcharCall identifier in the Sandata system.
CALLLATITUDEnumericIf using MVV, this field along with Call In Longitude will reflect the coordinates from which the worker/caregiver checked in to start the visit
CALLLONGITUDEnumericIf using MVV, this field along with Call In Latitude will reflect the coordinates from which the worker/caregiver checked in to start the visit
CALLTIMEZONEnvarcharTime zone where the call occurred
CALLTYPEnvarcharThe type of device used to create the event. Values: TELEPHONY, MOBILE, FVV, MANUAL, OTHER. Additional values for this field may be added.
CLIENTIDENTIFIERONCALLnvarcharClient ID entered or selected on Sandata EVV Event. This value is not validated – it is based on the worker’s entry during the call.
GROUPCODEnvarcharThis visit was part of a group visit. Group Code is used to reassemble all members of the group. Note that Alternate EVV vendors may not supply this value.
INSERT_DATEdateIf the Visit has a call-in/check-in recorded, the value of this column will be 1
md5_hashvarcharThe MD5 hash is built off all columns and is to be used with available primary and/or business keys included in the respective file. Is included to simplify any delta loading processes during file imports. row-by-row validation check using the hash bytes MD5 function to compare every character between the source and target tables. The primary objective, apart from confirming matching data, was to identify special characters that would cause issues with data loads
MOBILELOGINnvarcharLogin used if a mobile application is in use for GPS calls. Required if Call Type = Mobile.
ORIGINATINGPHONENUMBERnvarcharOriginating phone number for telephony. Required if Call Type = Telephony.
PROCEDURECODEnvarcharThis is the billable procedure code
which would be mapped to the
associated service.
RECORDUPDATEDATETIMEdateDate and time change applied in Sandata system. To the second.
RECORDUPDATEDBYnvarcharThe unique identifier of the user, system or process that made the change. This value could also be a system process in which case it will be identified.
SERVICEENTEREDONCALLnvarcharService selected on the Call. Mapped to the appropriate HCPCS code. This value is not validated – it is based on the worker’s entry during the call.
TELEPHONYPINnvarcharPIN for telephony.
UPDATE_DATEdateLast date the calls were updated
VISITKEYnvarcharVisit identifier in the Sandata system. Note that the same Visit Key can be sent multiple times over the course of different exports. Subsequent Visit Keys are updates to the prior visit.
VISITLOCATIONnvarcharLocation of the visit defined by the schedule or selected by the user.
VISITLOCATIONTYPEnvarcharType of location for the visit. Possible values include: 1 = Home, 2 = Community
VISITNOTESnvarcharFrom the Sandata mobile application. Visit notes entered during the visit by the worker.
T_EVV_VISIT_TASKS
Column NameColumn AliasData TypeDescription
CALLKEYnvarcharCall identifier in the Sandata system. If the task was entered on a specific call, this value will be included.
INSERT_DATEdateDate when tasks were added to the EVV system
md5_hashvarcharThe MD5 hash is built off all columns and is to be used with available primary and/or business keys included in the respective file. Is included to simplify any delta loading processes during file imports. row-by-row validation check using the hash bytes MD5 function to compare every character between the source and target tables. The primary objective, apart from confirming matching data, was to identify special characters that would cause issues with data loads
RECORDUPDATEDATETIMEdateDate and time change applied in Sandata system. To the second.
RECORDUPDATEDBYnvarcharThe unique identifier of the user, system or process that made the change. This value could also be a system process in which case it will be identified. Blank if captured during actual call.
TASKIDnvarcharTask ID, this TaskID must map to the
Task IDs used for the agency in the
Sandata system
TASKREADINGnvarcharTask reading
TASKREFUSEDnvarcharIndictor if the client refused the specific task.
TASKUNITnvarcharTask unit. Units that are used when collecting the tasks assuming readings are in use.
UPDATE_DATEdateDate when tasks were last updated in the evv system
VISITKEYnvarcharVisit identifier in the Sandata system. Note that the same Visit Key can be sent multiple times over the course of different exports. Subsequent Visit Keys are updates to the prior visit.
T_EVV_VISIT_CHANGES
Column NameColumn AliasData TypeDescription
CHANGEDATETIMEdateTime when the change to the visit was made
CHANGEIDnvarcharThe unique identifier of the change that is being sent. These can be used to denote the order in which changes were made to the visit, although they are not sequential.
CHANGEMADEBYnvarcharThe unique identifier of the user that made the change. If the change is a result of non-user activities, e.g. Alt-EVV processing, then this field will be blank.
CHANGEREASONMEMOnvarcharReason/Description of the change being made entered by the user.
CHANGETYPEnvarcharThe type of change being applied: A (Add), C (Change), M (Merge).
INSERT_DATEdateThe date when the changes were added to the database
md5_hashvarcharThe MD5 hash is built off all columns and is to be used with available primary and/or business keys included in the respective file. Is included to simplify any delta loading processes during file imports. row-by-row validation check using the hash bytes MD5 function to compare every character between the source and target tables. The primary objective, apart from confirming matching data, was to identify special characters that would cause issues with data loads
REASONCODEnvarcharReason code selected. It is possible that some changes may not require a reason code.
RECORDUPDATEDATETIMEdateDate and time change applied in Sandata system. To the second.
RESOLUTIONCODEnvarcharResolution codes, if selected.
Resolution Codes are specific to the
program.
SEQUENCEIDnvarcharThe Sequence ID provides a unique sequence identifier for all changes made to the visit. These values are assigned globally within the Sandata EVV system as changes are made and logged and will always be increasing. The Sequence ID will generally not be sequential.
UPDATE_DATEdateDate when changes were last updated in the evv system
VISITCHANGEEXTERNALIDnvarcharChange identifier in the external system if applicable.
VISITCHANGELOGDETAILSnvarcharSnapshot of full visit record at the time of change.
VISITKEYnvarcharVisit identifier in the Sandata system. Note that the same Visit Key can be sent multiple times over the course of different exports. Subsequent Visit Keys are updates to the prior visit.
VISITLOGKEYnvarcharUnique identifier for visit change record in the Sandata system.
T_EVV_CONTROL
Column NameColumn AliasData TypeDescription
CLIENT_ADDRnumericAddress of the client
CLIENT_AUTHnumericClient authorization
CLIENT_DESIGNEEnumericRefers to the person the individual receiving services has designated as their EOR (employer of record)
CLIENT_GENERALnumericGeneral information of the client
CLIENT_PHONEnumericPhone number of the client
CLIENT_SCHEDULEnumericThe schedule allotted to the client
EMP_DISCnumericEmployee
EMP_GENERALnumericEmployee general information
EXP_END_DATETIMEdateExpected end date and time
EXP_START_DATETIMEdateExpected start date and time
FILE_SIZEnumericFile size
LOAD_DATEdateThe date the file was run
md5_hashvarcharThe MD5 hash is built off all columns and is to be used with available primary and/or business keys included in the respective file. Is included to simplify any delta loading processes during file imports. row-by-row validation check using the hash bytes MD5 function to compare every character between the source and target tables. The primary objective, apart from confirming matching data, was to identify special characters that would cause issues with data loads
PROVIDER_GENERALnumericSuspension Date, Termination Date
PROVIDER_LOCnumericLocation of the Provider
RECS_GENERATEDnumericRecords generated
TOTAL_FILESnumericTotal number of files
VISIT_CALLSnumericAdditional information regarding the call is entered here
VISIT_CHANGESnumericChanges for the visit
VISIT_CLAIMSTnumericVisit claim status
VISIT_EXCPnumericVisit exceptions made
VISIT_GENERALnumericGeneral information regarding the visit
VISIT_TASKSnumericTasks performed during the visit
EVV_CMS_EVIDENCE_EXAMPLE
Column NameColumn AliasData TypeDescription
CLIENT_FNAMEnvarcharFirst name of the client
CLIENT_IDnvarcharUnique client identifier in EVV within each account
CLIENT_LNAMEnvarcharLast name of the client
DATE_OF_SERVICEdateThe date the client was provided service
EMPLOYEE_FIRSTNAMEnvarcharWorker/Caregiver’s first name
EMPLOYEE_IDnvarcharUnique identifier the provider designated to each of their workers/caregivers.
EMPLOYEE_LASTNAMEnvarcharWorker/Caregiver’s last name
LATITUDEnumericGPS latitude recorded during event.
Latitude has a range of -90 to 90
with a 15 digit precision. Required
for Call Type = Mobile
LONGITUDEnumericGPS longitude recorded during event. Longitude has a range of -180 to 180 with a 15 digit precision. Required for Call Type = Mobile.
md5_hashvarcharThe MD5 hash is built off all columns and is to be used with available primary and/or business keys included in the respective file. Is included to simplify any delta loading processes during file imports. row-by-row validation check using the hash bytes MD5 function to compare every character between the source and target tables. The primary objective, apart from confirming matching data, was to identify special characters that would cause issues with data loads
SERVICE_BEG_DATEdateService Begin date
SERVICE_BEGIN_DATETIMEnvarcharService Begin date and time
SERVICE_END_DATEdateService End Date
SERVICE_END_DATETIMEnvarcharService End Date and time
TYPE_OF_SERVICEnvarcharType of service received by the client
VISIT_KEYnvarcharVisit identifier in the Sandata system. Note that the same Visit Key can be sent multiple times over the course of different exports. Subsequent Visit Keys are updates to the prior visit.
T_EVV_CLIENT_DESIGNEE
Column NameColumn AliasData TypeDescription
CLIENTDESIGNEEEMAILnvarcharThe email address of the person the individual receiving the services has designated as their EOR (employer of record)
CLIENTDESIGNEEENDDATEdateEnd date of the person the individual receiving the services has designated as their EOR (employer of record)
CLIENTDESIGNEEFIRSTNAMEnvarcharFirst name of the person the individual receiving the services has designated as their EOR (employer of record)
CLIENTDESIGNEELASTNAMEnvarcharLast name of the person the individual receiving the services has designated as their EOR (employer of record)
CLIENTDESIGNEERELATIONSHIPnvarcharRefers to the relationship to the person the individual receiving services has designated as their EOR (employer of record)
CLIENTDESIGNEESTARTDATEdateStart date of the person the individual receiving the services has designated as their EOR (employer of record)
CLIENTDESIGNEESTATUSnvarcharThe active status of the person the individual receiving the services has designated as their EOR (employer of record)
CLIENTIDnvarcharAssigned client identifier. Note that this value may be used as the client identifier for telephony and MVV when Client ID entry is applicable. This value uniquely identifies the client in the Sandata system.
INSERT_DATEdateThe date the designee was added to the record
md5_hashvarcharThe MD5 hash is built off all columns and is to be used with available primary and/or business keys included in the respective file. Is included to simplify any delta loading processes during file imports. row-by-row validation check using the hash bytes MD5 function to compare every character between the source and target tables. The primary objective, apart from confirming matching data, was to identify special characters that would cause issues with data loads
UPDATE_DATEdateThe updated date the designee was added to the record
T_EVV_CLIENT_PHONE
Column NameColumn AliasData TypeDescription
CLIENTIDnvarcharAssigned client identifier. Note that this value may be used as the client identifier for telephony and MVV when Client ID entry is applicable. This value uniquely identifies the client in the Sandata system.
CLIENTPHONEnvarcharClient phone number.
CLIENTPHONETYPEnvarcharValues: Home, Mobile, Business and Other. Note that multiple of the same type can be provided.
INSERT_DATEdateThe date when the client phone number was added to the database
md5_hashvarcharThe MD5 hash is built off all columns and is to be used with available primary and/or business keys included in the respective file. Is included to simplify any delta loading processes during file imports. row-by-row validation check using the hash bytes MD5 function to compare every character between the source and target tables. The primary objective, apart from confirming matching data, was to identify special characters that would cause issues with data loads
PROVIDERIDnvarcharIdentifier for the provider. Identifier type identified by Provider Qualifier.
UPDATE_DATEdateThe date when the client phone number was last updated
T_EVV_EMP_GENERAL
Column NameColumn AliasData TypeDescription
DEPARTMENTnvarcharDepartment the employee belongs to
EMPLOYEEADDRESS1nvarcharWorker/Caregiver’s street address
EMPLOYEEADDRESS2nvarcharSecond line of worker/caregiver’s street address
EMPLOYEEAPInvarcharEmployee client’s alternate provider
identifier or Medicaid ID
EMPLOYEEBIRTHDATEdateDate of birth of the employee
EMPLOYEECITYnvarcharCity where the worker/caregiver resides
EMPLOYEEEMAILnvarcharEmail address associated with the worker/caregiver
EMPLOYEEFIRSTNAMEnvarcharWorker/Caregiver’s first name
EMPLOYEEHIREDATEdateDate when the worker/caregiver was employed by the provider
EMPLOYEEIDnvarcharUnique employee identifier. This value uniquely identifies the employee in the Sandata system.
EMPLOYEEIDCUSTOM1nvarcharEmployee identifier identified by
Employee Qualifier. If employee
information is received from the
payer, this information will be used
to link the received Third Party EVV
information with the payer
information provided and should be
defined as the same value.
EMPLOYEEIDCUSTOM2nvarcharUnique employee identifier in the
external system
EMPLOYEELASTNAMEnvarcharWorker/Caregiver’s last name
EMPLOYEELOCATIONNAMEnvarcharLocation name of Worker/Caregiver
EMPLOYEEPHONEnvarcharPhone number of the Worker/Caregiver
EMPLOYEESTATEnvarcharState where the worker/caregiver resides
EMPLOYEETYPEnvarcharSuch as nurse or home health attendant. This is user defined varies based on the source system.
EMPLOYEEZIPCODEnvarchar Employee’s 9 digit zip code.
If additional 4 digits is not known, zeros padded.
EMPLOYETERMDATEdateLatest end date on the employee record. Helps determine employee active status
INSERT_DATEdateThe date when the employee general information was added to the database
md5_hashvarcharThe MD5 hash is built off all columns and is to be used with available primary and/or business keys included in the respective file. Is included to simplify any delta loading processes during file imports. row-by-row validation check using the hash bytes MD5 function to compare every character between the source and target tables. The primary objective, apart from confirming matching data, was to identify special characters that would cause issues with data loads
PAYRATEnvarcharRate for payroll. Can have values like 5.043 or 1.23 and should not exceed 5 characters. Decimal point is included in the length.
PROVIDERIDnvarcharUnique identifier for the agency.
SOCIALSECURITYnvarcharEmployee Social Security Number.
Employee SSN may be required
depending on the program rules.
UPDATE_DATEdateThe date when the employee general information was last updated
T_EVV_EMP_DISC
Column NameColumn AliasData TypeDescription
EMPLOYEEDISCIPLINEnvarcharCode defining the discipline(s) of the employee. Examples depending on the program include HHA, RN, LPN, PT, etc.
EMPLOYEEIDnvarcharUnique employee identifier. This value uniquely identifies the employee in the Sandata system.
INSERT_DATEdateThe date when the employee description was added to the database
md5_hashvarcharThe MD5 hash is built off all columns and is to be used with available primary and/or business keys included in the respective file. Is included to simplify any delta loading processes during file imports. row-by-row validation check using the hash bytes MD5 function to compare every character between the source and target tables. The primary objective, apart from confirming matching data, was to identify special characters that would cause issues with data loads
PROVIDERIDnvarcharUnique identifier for the agency.
UPDATE_DATEdateThe date when the employee description was last updated

Column NameColumn AliasData TypeDescription
END_TIMEdateEnd of the run
FAIL_REC_COUNTnumericFailed record count
FILE_EXPECTED_REC_CNTnumericFile expected record count
FILE_NAMEnvarcharName of the file
FILE_TYPEnvarcharType of the file
LOAD_DATEdateThe date the file was run
md5_hashvarcharThe MD5 hash is built off all columns and is to be used with available primary and/or business keys included in the respective file. Is included to simplify any delta loading processes during file imports. row-by-row validation check using the hash bytes MD5 function to compare every character between the source and target tables. SUCCESS_FLAGnvarcharIndicates that the run was successful

acknowledged.

Is included to simplify any delta loading processes during file imports. row-by-row validation check using the hash bytes MD5 function to compare every character between the source and target tables. LOCATIONCITYnvarcharCity code of the provider location
LOCATIONCONTACTFIRSTNAMEnvarcharFirst name for the provider

Provider

T_PR_ADDR_ID
Column NameColumn AliasData TypeDescription
ADDR_MATCH_CODEGeocoding Address Match CodeVARCHAR Contains high-level information about non-valid address elements in an address. The code describes the validation issues that affect address records with a Match Code status in the range I1 through I4 indicate that an address is invalid.
ADDR_MATCH_DESCGeocoding Address Match DescriptionVARCHAR Text description of the Geocoding Address Match Code.
ADDR_TYPAddress TypeCHARThis address type has 3 values
ATTNAttention toCHARContact name of person or department for the location.
BUS_PHOBusiness Phone NumberCHARBusiness Phone Number
CITYCity/Town VARCHAR The name of a city or a town. 
COUNTYGeocoding Address CountyCHARThe County value as defined by the AddressDoctor application using the geocoded information.
CTRYCountryCHARCountry Codes; 01 UNITED STATES OF AMERICA, 02 MEXICO, 03 Canada, 99 Other
CTYCountyCHARCounty
CURRENT_INDCurrent IndicatorCHARIndicates information is current or not.
DAT_REC_ADDEDRecord Added Date DATEThe original date for when the address was added to the table.
E_MAIL_ADDREmail AddressCHARProvider or contact for the provider email address.
E_MAIL_INDEmail IndicatorCHARY = yes or N = no; file use or to receive notification of fee at registration, if applicable.
EFF_BEG_DATEffective Begin Date DATEThe begin date for when the location is valid.
EFF_END_DATEffective End Date DATEThe date for when the location is no longer valid.
EMG_PHOEmergency Phone NumberCHAREmergency Phone Number
EMPR_TAX_IDEmployer Tax Identification CHAREIN or SSN used when submitting claims.
FAX_INDFax back verificationCHARY = yes or N = no; not used for PRS purposes.
FAX_PHOFax Phone NumberCHARFax Phone Number
GEO_ADDR_CITYGeocoding Address CityVARCHAR Geocoding takes the Provider's fixed address and converts it to the proper USPS formatting to City.
GEO_ADDR_STGeocoding Address StateCHARGeocoding takes the Provider's fixed address and converts it to the proper USPS formatting to State
GEO_ADDR_STR1Geocoding Address Street 1VARCHAR Geocoding takes the Provider's fixed address and converts it to the proper USPS formatting to Address Street 1.
GEO_ADDR_STR2Geocoding Address Street 2VARCHAR Geocoding takes the Provider's fixed address and converts it to the proper USPS formatting to additional address line if needed.
GEO_ADDR_ZIP_4Geocoding Address Zip Code 4CHARGeocoding takes the Provider's fixed address and converts it to the proper USPS formatting to4 digit zip code.
GEO_ADDR_ZIP_5Geocoding Address Zip Code 5CHARGeocoding takes the Provider's fixed address and converts it to the proper USPS formatting to 5 digit zip code.
GEOMATCH_CODEGeocoding Match CodeVARCHAR Contains high-level information about the accuracy and validity.
GEOMATCH_DESCGeocoding Match DescriptionVARCHAR Text description of the Geocoding Match Code.
GSAGeocoding Address GSACHAR Geographic Service Area. Note this is NOT a geocoded item.
LAST_MOD_DATLast Modified Date DATEThe date for when the address was last modified.
LATTITUDEGeocoding Address LatitudeNUMBERGeographical coordinates corresponding to Latitude of the fixed address.
LOC_CDLocation CodeCHARIdentifies the location number of the address (S01=service location 1).
LONGITUDEGeocoding Address LongitudeNUMBERGeographical coordinates corresponding to Longitude of the fixed address.
MAILABILITY_SCOREGeocoding Mailability ScoreVARCHAR Describe the validity of an address and the ability to accurately deliver mailed items.
METRO_RURALGeocoding Address Metro/RuralCHARIdentifies an address as either Metro or Rural. Note this is NOT a geocoded item.
PAY_LOC_CDPay Location CodeCHARIdentifies the location number of the TIN (P01=Pay to location 1).
PR_IDProvider IDCHARThis is a 6 digit MQD Provider ID.
RESERVATION_INDGeocoding Reservation IndicatorCHARIdentifies an address as either On-Reservation or Off-Reservation. Note this is NOT a geocoded item.
SEND_MAIL_INDSend Mail IndicatorCHARIndicates if mail has been sent to the provider.
SERVICE_CLASSService ClassCHARService Class Code.
STStateCHARState
STR_1Street 1VARCHAR Address line 1
STR_2Street 2VARCHAR Additional address line if needed.
SYS_BEG_DATSystem Begin Date DATEDate the screen was updated; system generated.
SYS_END_DAT System End Date DATEThe date for when the ID is no longer valid /system generated.
VENDOR_NUMVendor IDCHARTHE ID VERIFICATION NUMBER FOR THE VENDOR
ZIP4Zip Code 4CHAR4 digit extension of the 5 digit zip code
ZIP5Zip Code 5 CHAR5 digit Zip Code
T_PR_ADDR_ID_FAX
Column NameColumn AliasData TypeDescription
ADDR_TYPAddress TypeCHARThis address type has 3 values
CURRENT_INDCurrent Indicator CHARIndicates information is current or not.
E_MAIL_ADDREmail AddressVARCHAR Email address
E_MAIL_INDEmail IndicatorCHARY = yes or N = no; file use or to receive notification of fee at registration, if applicable.
FAX_INDFax IndicatorCHAR(From Rebeca: Indicates whether or not verifications should be faxed back to the provider.) From Provider team: 'Y', 'N'
FAX_PHOFax Phone NumberCHARFax Phone Number
FROM_DATFrom DateDATEFIELD NOT IN PROVIDER TABLE
LOC_CDLocation CodeCHARIdentifies the location number of the address (S01=service location 1).
MOD_DATELast Modified Date DATEThe date for when the address was last modified.
MOD_TIMELast Modified TimeCHARTime record was last modified.
MOD_USERLast Modified UserCHARSystem user name who last modified/changed screen.
ODS_LOAD_DATEODS Load DateDATEThe date the record was loaded into the data warehouse.
PR_IDProvider ID CHARThis is a 6 digit MQD Provider ID.
STAStatus CodeCHARIndicates whether the record is in "active" or "historical" status
THRU_DATThrough DateDATEThrough Date (FIELD NOT IN PROVIDER TABLE)
T_PR_ALT_ID
Column NameColumn AliasData TypeDescription
BEG_DATBegin Date DATEThe begin date for when the alternate ID is valid.
CURRENT_INDCurrent Indicator CHARIndicates information is current or not.
END_DATEnd Date DATEThe date for when the alternate ID is no longer valid.
LAST_MOD_DATLast Modified Date DATEThe date for when the alternate ID was last modified.
PR_ALT_IDAlternate ID CHAR6-10 digit alpha numeric ID in addition to the provider ID.
PR_ALT_ID_TYPID Type CHARSpecifies the type of Alt ID
PR_IDProvider ID CHARThis is a 6 digit MQD Provider ID.
PR_STAAlternate ID Status (in Cognos: Provider Status)CHARIndicates if alternate ID is Active or Inactive.
REC_ADD_DATRecord Added Date DATEThe original date for when the alternate ID was added to the table.
SRCAlternate ID Source CHARSource ID assigned when alternate ID is received via data load.

AUTH_NOVARCHAR Authorized Number
CONFIRMATION_NOVARCHAR Confirmation number

DATE_POSTEDdateDate Posted
LAST_MOD_DATLast Modified DatedateDate the record was last modified.
LAST_MOD_TIMELast Modified TimeVARCHAR The time the record was last modified.
LAST_MOD_USRLast Modified UserVARCHAR The user who last modified the record.
md5_hashVARCHAR The MD5 hash is built off all columns and is to be used with available primary and/or business keys included in the respective file. Is included to simplify any delta loading processes during file imports. row-by-row validation check using the hash bytes MD5 function to compare every character between the source and target tables. PR_IDVARCHAR Provider ID
REC_ADDED_DATdateThe date the record was added to the database
REC_ADDED_TIMEVARCHAR The time the record was added to the database
REC_ADDED_USRVARCHAR The user who added the record to the database
SEQ_NUMNumberSequence Number
TRANS_AMTNumberTransaction Amount
TRANS_DATEdateTransaction Date
T_PR_AUTH_SIG
Column NameColumn AliasData TypeDescription
AUTH_SIGAuthorized Signor CHARA person who has been granted permission to sign for and on the behalf of a provider.
DOBDate of Birth DATEThe date for when the authorized signor was born.
DTE_BEGBegin Date DATEThe begin date for when the authorized signor is valid.
DTE_ENDEnd Date DATEThe begin date for when the authorized signor is no longer valid.
DTE_LAST_MODLast Modified Date DATEThe date of when the authorized signor was last modified.
DTE_REC_ADDDate Record Added DATEThe original date for when the authorized signor was added.
PR_IDProvider ID CHARThis is a 6 digit MQD Provider ID.
SSNSocial Security Number CHAR9 digit ID number assigned to individuals by the United States Social Security Administration.
STA_CDStatus CodeCHARIndicates whether the record is in "active" or "historical" status
T_PR_BUSINESS_INFO
Column NameColumn AliasData TypeDescription
FACL_GRP_INDIV_INDVARCHAR Indicator that states whether Provider is a facility, a group or individual.
ADD_DATEdateAdded Date
ADD_TIMEVARCHAR Time the record was added to the database
ADD_USERVARCHAR The user who made changes to the record
CURRENT_INDVARCHAR Current Indicator
DBA_NAMEVARCHAR Doing Business As
md5_hashVARCHAR The MD5 hash is built off all columns and is to be used with available primary and/or business keys included in the respective file. Is included to simplify any delta loading processes during file imports. row-by-row validation check using the hash bytes MD5 function to compare every character between the source and target tables. The primary objective, apart from confirming matching data, was to identify special characters that would cause issues with data loads

PR_LNAMEVARCHAR Provider Last Name
PR_MIVARCHAR Provider Middle Intial
PROFIT_STATUS_CDVARCHAR Profit Status Code

01 501(C)(3) NON-PROFIT

02 FOR-PROFIT, CLOSELY HELD

03 FOR-PROFIT, PUBLICLY TRADED

04 OTHER

88 N/A – The individual only practices as part of a group

(Note: To be used as Profit-Status-CD code for T-MSIS reporting)

TAX_NAMEVARCHAR Tax Name

END_DATEnd Date DATEThe begin date for when the COS is no longer valid.

Column NameColumn AliasData TypeDescription

APP_FEE_STAT_DATApplication Fee Status Begin Date DATEDate of latest Application Fee Status update.
APPL_DATApplication Date DATEDate of when the provider completed the original/initial applcation for registration.
CERT_DATCertification DateDATECertification Date
DAT_REC_ADDEDDate Record AddedDATEThe original date for when the demographic information was added.
DOBDate of Birth DATEProvider's Date of Birth, applicable to individuals.
ENRL_BEG_DATEnrollment Begin Date DATEA provider's requested begin date, found on Initial application.
ENRL_END_DATEnrollment End Date DATEEnrollment End Date .
ENRL_STA_INDEnrollment Status IndicatorCHARIndicates the status of the enrollment
FFS_TYPFFS Type CHAR2 digit number which identifies a providers member appointment preference.
GENDERGender CHARProvider's gender, applicable to individuals.
HOSPITAL_CLASHospital Class Level, Hawaii Only (In Cognos: Hospital Classification)CHARHospital Class Level, Hawaii Only.
IHS_INDIHS Indicator CHARSelf disclosed answer, provided on the application for registration Y = Yes, N = No.
IMD_BEDIMD Bed Indicator CHARIdentifies if the IMD providers have 17 or more adult beds.
IND_NPINPI Indicator CHARIndicates if NPI is expected, based on provider type.
LAST_ADJU_DATLast Adjudication DateDATEThe date on which an encounter was last adjudicated for this provider (From Provider Team: Date claims last adjudicated)
LAST_AUD_DATLast Audit Date DATELast Audit Date .
LAST_MOD_DATLast Modified Date DATEDate of when screen was last modified/changed.
LAST_MOD_USRLast Modified UserCHARSystem user name of who last modified/changed screen.
NPI_IND_EFF_DATNPI Indicator Begin DateDATEBegin date of when the provider type was required to have a NPI for regsitration.
PCP_INDPCP Indicator CHARFlag to Identify Primary Care Physician 
PCP_SPEC_INDPCP Specialty IndicatorCHARIdentifies if a primary care physician provider has a specialty status.
PES_PMT_IDPES Payment IDCHARFrom Provider Team: Enrollment fee identification number.
PR_DEGDegree CHAR2-4 digit alpha code which describes professional educational credentials.
PR_IDProvider IDCHARThis is a 6 digit MQD Provider ID.
PR_NAMEProvider NameCHARName of Provider.
PR_TYPProvider Type CHAR2 digit number numeric and/or alpha which identifies a provider type.
PROV_340BProvider 340-B IndicatorCHARIndicates if Provider uses 340B Pricing.
RATE_SCH_INDRate Schedule IndicatorCHARIndicates whether or not the provider has a rate schedule record on file
RCV_ELECT_REMReceive Electronic ReimbursementCHARIndicates if Provider can received electronic reimbursement. Y=Yes, N=No.
RISK_LEVELRisk Level CHARIdentifies the designated risk level based on provider type. Risk levels can be elevated, higher then defaulted, if required.
RSTN_INDRestriction IndicatorCHARIndicates whether or not the provider has a restriction record on file.
SSNSSN CHAR9 digit ID number assigned to individuals by the United States Social Security Administration.
SURS_TYPType of Utilization Review System (In Cognos: SURS Type)CHARType of utilization review system ??
TAPE_CDTape CodeCHARTape Code (not used)
TYP_PRA_ORGOrganization Type (In Cognos: Type of Practice Organization)CHARDescribes the practice setting.
VBP_INDValue Based Provider IndicatorCHARIndicates if Provider uses Value Based Pricing.

Column NameColumn AliasData TypeDescription
IND_304BVARCHAR Indicator for 304B
MMIS_TXNVARCHAR Referencing the provider table where the error occurred
APP_FEE_CDApp Fee CodeVARCHAR Fee Option code:

1- Pay Fee

2 - Fee Paid To Medicare

3 - Fee Paid To Medicaid in Another State

4 - Request Hardship Waiver

5 - MQD / Med-QUEST Prior Payment

6 - Issue Refund

7 - COVID-19 Waiver
APPLICANT_TYPEVARCHAR A code that identifies whether the enrolling Provider is Servicing Only provider or regular individual provider.

REG – Regular Individual/Sole Provider
SER – Rendering/Servicing Provider
ATREG – Atypical Individual/Sole Provider
ATSER – Atypical Rendering/Servicing Provider
APPLICATION_DATEdateDate on which provider submits the enrollment application. 
DOBDate of Birth dateDate of Birth
ENROLL_BEG_DATEEnrollment Begin Date dateBusiness Status Start Date or the earliest available Business Status Start Date if there are multiple segments 
ENROLLMENT_TYPEEnrollment Type VARCHAR The code identifier for an enrollment type:

1 - Individual/Sole Proprietor

2 - Group Practice (Corporation, Partnership, LLC, etc.)

4 - Facility/Agency/Organization (FAO-Hospital, Nursing Facility, Various Entities)

7 - Contractor/MCO

9 - Atypical Individual Provider

11 - Atypical Agency Provider

(Note: To be used as FACL-GRP-INDIV-IND in T-MSIS Reporting)
ENTITY_DBAEntity Business Name/Doing Business Name VARCHAR Doing Business As Name at the Organization Level

(Note: To be used as Business DBA name record for T-MSIS)
ERROR_MSGVARCHAR Batchfeed error message specific to table
ERROR_VIOLATIONSVARCHAR Error Violations
EVOBRIX_APPLICATION_IDevoBrix Application ID VARCHAR Enrollment Application ID. 
EVOBRIX_PR_IDevoBrix Provider ID VARCHAR evoBrix Provider ID. 
FEINVARCHAR Federal Tax Identifier of the Organization. 
FFS_TYPEFFS Type VARCHAR Corresponds to MMIS Fee for services type codes

01

02

03

04

05

06

07

08

99
FIRST_NAMEFirst Name VARCHAR The first name of the individual Provider entity. 
GENDERGender VARCHAR The gender identifier of the individual Provider entity:

M - Male

F - Female
HOSPITAL_CLASS_LVLHospital Class Level VARCHAR Hospital Class Level

01=CLASS I: AVE<250 MEDICAID DISCHARGE/YR

02=CLASS II: AVE 250+ DISCHARGE W/NO RES

03=CLASS III: 250+ DISCHARGE W/RES

04=CLASS IV: FREE STANDING REHAB HOS

Y - Yes

N - No

Populate "E" = MMIS ID on the Enrollment Side

KEY_VALUEKey Value VARCHAR MQD ID - AZ
Med-QUEST ID - HI
LAST_NAMEVARCHAR The last name of the individual Provider entity. 
LEGAL_ENTITY_NAMELegal Entity Name VARCHAR In case of individual, legal name represents combination of last name and first name (Last Name, First Name). 
md5_hashVARCHAR The MD5 hash is built off all columns and is to be used with available primary and/or business keys included in the respective file. Is included to simplify any delta loading processes during file imports. row-by-row validation check using the hash bytes MD5 function to compare every character between the source and target tables. The primary objective, apart from confirming matching data, was to identify special characters that would cause issues with data loads

MMIS_PR_TYPE_CDMMIS Provider Type Code VARCHAR Refer to tables 1 and 2 under Reference Tables section below for Arizona and Hawaii, respectively. 
NPI_INDNPI Indicator VARCHAR Flag to Identify NPI usage of a Provider

Y - Yes

N - No
ODS_LOAD_DATEODS Load DatedateThe date the record was loaded into the data warehouse.
OWNERSHIP_CDOwnership Code VARCHAR Ownership Code:

01 - Voluntary – Non-Profit – Religious Organizations

02 - Voluntary – Non-Profit – Other

03 - Voluntary – multiple owners

04 - Proprietary – Individual

05 - Proprietary – Corporation

06 - Proprietary – Partnership

07 - Proprietary – Other

08 - Proprietary – multiple owners

09 - Government – Federal

10 - Government – State

11 - Government – City

12 - Government – County

13 - Government – City-County

14 - Government – Hospital District

15 - Government – State and City/County

16 - Government – other multiple owners

17 - Voluntary /Proprietary

18 - Proprietary/Government

19 - Voluntary/Government

20 - Other

(Note: To be used as OWNERSHIP-CD for T-MSIS Reporting)
PCP_INDPCP Indicator VARCHAR Flag to Identify Primary Care Physician

Y - Yes

N - No

THE IDENTIFICATION NUMBER ASSIGNED TO A PROVIDER OF SERVICES IN THE MQD PROGRAM
PRA_ORG_TYP_INDPRA ORG Type IndicatorVARCHAR This value will be used identify a school-based group biller

15
PRIMARY_NPIPrimary NPI VARCHAR The Primary National Provider Identifier of the Provider. 
PROFIT_STATUS_CDProfit Status Code VARCHAR Profit Status Code

01 501(C)(3) NON-PROFIT

02 FOR-PROFIT, CLOSELY HELD

03 FOR-PROFIT, PUBLICLY TRADED

04 OTHER

88 N/A – The individual only practices as part of a group

(Note: To be used as Profit-Status-CD code for T-MSIS reporting)
REC_SETNUMBERThe set to which the record is attached.
REC_TYPERecord Type VARCHAR Unique ID to represent different type of Records. Value is populated as 1000. 
REVALIDATION_END_DATEdateThe Provider’s actual end date of the revalidation.
REVALIDATION_START_DATEdateThe Provider’s actual start date of the revalidation.
RISK_LEVELVARCHAR Risk level assigned to a provider

L=Limited

M=Moderate

H=High

If both the Risk Level and Risk Reason indicators are populated for an Arizona provider, then Risk Reason will be sent here.

HAD=34-HIGH MQD DETERMINATION

HEH=31-HIGH EXCLUSION HISTORY

HMO=32-HIGH MCD OVERPAYMENT

HMT=33-HIGH MORATORIUM

HPS=30-HIGH PAYMENT SUSPENSION

LICENSE_CERT_INDLicense Certification IndicatorVARCHAR Indicates whether the given license is a Certificate or Licenses.

L - License

C - Certificate

C1-C4 - For CLIA Licenses
LICENSE_CERT_NBRLicense Certification NumberVARCHAR The license or certification number.  For licenses validated through Hawaii's DCCA Interface only, the License/Certification No will be sent in the following format: the HOKU License Classification Type, a sequence of padded zeros, and the License Number will be combined to reach a length of 15 characters, plus any remaining applicable filler characters.   
LICENSE_CERT_TYPELicense Certification TypeVARCHAR Internal evoBrix License Type Codes. 
md5_hashVARCHAR The MD5 hash is built off all columns and is to be used with available primary and/or business keys included in the respective file. Is included to simplify any delta loading processes during file imports. row-by-row validation check using the hash bytes MD5 function to compare every character between the source and target tables. The primary objective, apart from confirming matching data, was to identify special characters that would cause issues with data loads

ACT_INEL_DATDATEThe date the eligibility agency says that the recipient was actually ineligible. Not necessarily the same as effective eligibility end date or eligibility end date.
AGY_END_DATDATEThe actual eligibility end date as determined by the agency
AHCCCS_IDCHARThe identification number assigned to a recipient of services MQD in the AHCCCS program
ANNL_GR_INCCHARAnnual increase applied to the spend down amount
APPL_DATDATEThis field contains the date that a signed application was received
BEG_DATDATEBegin Date of Eligibility Key Code
BEN_CATCHARThe benefit category for the eligibility.
BEN_CONTCHARThe type of benefit continuance a recipient may receive. Benefit continuance extends a recipient's eligibility effective end date.
BEN_QUALCHARThe benefit qualifier for the eligibility.
CAT_INDCHARIndicates whether or not an eligibility is categorical. Federal Funding =Y
CHG_RSNCHARThe reason the record was changed.
CURRENT_INDCHARWarehouse value field. Indicates whether or not this is the most current segment. The field should only be utilized when trying to access the most current (date based) segment. When attaching to a claim or encounter, the from date of service should be utilized from the claim/encounter.
DAT_REC_ADDEDDATEDate record added to eligibility
DISC_NOT_DATDATEDiscontinuance notice mail date. The date on which the eligibility agency mailed the eligibility discontinuance notice. (county only)
ELG_CATCHARThis is the long description for Categorical Indicator code
ELG_KEY_CDCHAREligibility Key Code
ELG_PGMCHARThe eligibility program for the record
ELG_QUALCHARThe eligibility qualifier for the eligibility.
ELG_TYPCHARThe type of eligibility.
END_DATDATEEnd Date of Eligibility Key Code
FND_SRCCHARThe funding source for this record
LAST_MOD_DATDATELast Date Eligibility Record Changed
LAST_MOD_USRCHARThe user ID of the person or process that last updated the eligibility record.
md5_hashVARCHARThe MD5 hash is built off all columns and is to be used with available primary and/or business keys included in the respective file. Is included to simplify any delta loading processes during file imports. row-by-row validation check using the hash bytes MD5 function to compare every character between the source and target tables. The primary objective, apart from confirming matching data, was to identify special characters that would cause issues with data loads.
ORIG_END_DATDATEThe date on which eligibility originally ended
PRECEDENCE_LVLCHARThe value assigned to an eligibility to determine which one has highest precedence. It is a three digit numeric value assigned to determine what eligibility takes precedence. The lower the number, the higher the eligibility. Precedence level 000 would be the highest and 999 would be the lowest
PRI_AHCCCS_IDCHARThe identification number assigned to a recipient of services in the AHCCCS program
SITECHARThe site where eligibility was determined
SPND_DWN_AMTCHARThe amount of money to be spent in order to qualify for ahcccs eligibility; this amount is determined by the eligibility agency using the recipient's annual gross income and other factors (county only).
SPND_DWN_DATDATEMedical spend down date. The date on which the spend down amount was met. (county only)
SRCCHARThe input source of the data on the record identified with a code value found on RF522
STATUSCHARIndicates whether the record is in active (A) or inactive (I) status.
SUB_PGMCHARThe sub-program for this record
TIME_REC_ADDEDCHARTime record added to eligibility
WOR_IDCHARThis field is the id of the worker assigned to this entity
T_RP_PMT
Column NameColumn AliasData TypeDescription
ACT_PMT_DATDATEThe date of the actual payment.
AHCCCS_IDCHARThe identification number assigned to a recipient of services MQD in the AHCCCS program
AMTNUMBERThe payment amount
CAP_RATE_CDCHARThe code for the capitation rates for the payments. The Capitation Rate Code Med-QUEST pays for a
member
CTRT_TYPCHARThis field provides the one character code that is associated with the type(s) of contract a health plan holds with MQD. Contract types indicate a particular population or set of services that a health plan may provide.
CTY_SER_AREA_CDCHARA code identifying the county service area.
DAT_REC_ADDEDDATEThe date the record was added.
HP_IDCHARUnique Health Plan ID assigned by DHS MedQUEST.
LAST_MOD_DATDATEThe last date the record was modified.
md5_hashVARCHARThe MD5 hash is built off all columns and is to be used with available primary and/or business keys included in the respective file. Is included to simplify any delta loading processes during file imports. row-by-row validation check using the hash bytes MD5 function to compare every character between the source and target tables. The primary objective, apart from confirming matching data, was to identify special characters that would cause issues with data loads.
PD_MMTHNUMBERThe number of months paid for a member. (Percentage of the number of days eligible for the month)
PMT_CYCLECHARPayment cycle identifies the time interval for the payment - monthly, daily, retroactive
PMT_DATDATEPayment date; date capitation amount is paid to a health plan
PMT_FROM_DATDATEBeginning date of payment coverage
PMT_KEYVARCHAR2verify with Baiyina; 4/1 w/Baiyina
PMT_THRU_DATDATEThe paid thru date for payment coverage
PMT_TYPCHARThe type of benefit payment (Capitation or supplemental payment. )
PRI_AHCCCS_IDCHARThe identification number assigned to a recipient of services in the AHCCCS program
SEQ_NUMNUMBERThe Sequence Number is used to identify original payment records vs recoupment. Original payment records have a seq nbr of 0 (The sequence number assigned to the payment within a payment month)and recoupments of that payment record usually are in increments of 2
SMIB_TRN_CDCHARThe transaction code of the supplement medical insurance buy-in code that generated this payment
UPDATE_DTDATEPer RP team, cannot find this field on the table.
VOID_VOUCHARThe voucher id of the payment to which this void applies
VOU_IDCHARACS issues checks when it makes capitation payments on behalf of MQD. Each detailed payment documented on the 820 Transaction has a Voucher Number. The same Voucher Number can be associated with information for multiple members on the 834 Enrollment Transaction. This association makes
it possible for receivers of both 820 and 834 Transactions to audit payments at the member level. (A unique (by plan and contract type) voucher identification number for a health plan capitation payment)
T_HP_HI834_MONTHLY_ROSTER
Column NameColumn AliasData TypeDescription
ACT_TYPCHARCode indicating action type of add, change, or delete/disenroll. Code identifying a specific type of item maintenance.
ACTION_CDVARCHAR2Action codes are included on the daily 834 to provide the health plans with additional transaction information. Identifies, in general, the reason the client is being added to the plan’s membership. Action codes identify the type of information that has been changed. Identifies, in general,
the reason the client is being disenrolled from the plan’s membership.
ADD_DATEDATEThe date the record was added.
ARREARS_INDCHARIndicator used when the client is behind in making payments (per RP developer team: May not be used any longer)
BHS_CATVARCHAR2A code that indicates the level of behavioral health care services the member is eligible.
BHS_ENRL_FROMDATEThe begin date of recipient's BHS enrollment.
BHS_ENRL_THRUDATEThe end date of recipient's BHS enrollment.
BHS_PLANVARCHAR2The recipient's BHS plan
CAP_DAYSNUMBERThe number of days in between payment days (From and Thru)
CAP_RATE_CDVARCHAR2The code indicating the capitation payment method at the time the payment was made.
CASE_IDVARCHAR2Case Identification Number
CASE_NAME_FIRSTVARCHAR2The first name of the eligibility worker.
CASE_NAME_INITVARCHAR2The middle initial of the eligibility worker.
CASE_NAME_LASTVARCHAR2The last name of the eligibility worker.
CIS_CDVARCHAR2A variable whose values allow for tracking of beneficiaries throughout their engagement with and participation in various aspects of the CIS program. A code that recipient's current CIS program beneficiary status.
CIS_DEL_INDCHARIndicates to health plans that a CIS activity have been deleted/inactivated
CIS_FROM_DATDATEBegin date of Community Integration Services status code
CIS_THRU_DATDATEEnd date of Community Integration Services status code
CORR_DEM_INDVARCHAR2On Daily 834s, this element is used when enrolling a new member or
updating a member’s Date of Birth or Gender
CORR_INS_CDVARCHAR2This code is used when a change transaction on a Daily 834 transaction changes a member’s name.
CTRT_FROM_DATDATEThe begin date of the Health Plan
CTRT_THRU_DATDATEThe end date of the Health Plan
CTRT_TYPCHARThis field provides the one character code that is associated with the type(s) of contract a health plan holds with MQD. Contract types indicate a particular population or set of services that a health plan may provide.
CTRT_VERCHARHealth Plan Contract Version - A different form of the previous health plan contract
CTRT_YRCHARHealth Plan Contract Year - The year the health plan was/is active
DEN_CTRT_TYPCHARDental Health Contract Type
E_MAIL_ADDRVARCHAR2Recipient's email address
EMER_PHONEVARCHAR2Member's emergency telephone number
ENRL_FROM_DATDATEThe begin date of recipient's enrollment.
ENRL_THRU_DATDATEThe end date of recipient's enrollment.
ETHNICITYVARCHAR2The ethnicity of the member
EXCP_CDVARCHAR2Recipient Exception Processing Code
HAWI_IDCHARThe unique identifier of an individual member.
HP_IDCHARUnique Health Plan ID assigned by DHS MedQUEST.
INS_LINE_CDVARCHAR2Code identifying a group
of insurance products.
INTERP_INDVARCHAR2Code indicating if recipient requires an interpreter.
ISLAND_CDCHARThe recipient's island of residence
LANGUAGEVARCHAR2The primary language spoken in the member's household.
LTC_DEL_INDCHARIndicates to health plans that a LTC activity has been deleted/inactivated
LTC_FROM_DATDATEThe begin date of LTC activity
LTC_THRU_DATDATEThe end date of LTC activity
MARITAL_STAVARCHAR2The marital status of the recipient.
md5_hashVARCHARThe MD5 hash is built off all columns and is to be used with available primary and/or business keys included in the respective file. Is included to simplify any delta loading processes during file imports. row-by-row validation check using the hash bytes MD5 function to compare every character between the source and target tables. The primary objective, apart from confirming matching data, was to identify special characters that would cause issues with data loads.
MDC_CLM_IDVARCHAR2Medicare Claim ID
MDC_CVGCHARThe code identifying the recipient's Medicare Plan.
MED_CND_DESC_1VARCHAR2The description of the member's medical condition.
MED_CND_DESC_2VARCHAR2The description of the member's medical condition.
MED_CND_DESC_3VARCHAR2The description of the member's medical condition.
MED_CND_FROM_1DATEThe begin date of the member's medical condition.
MED_CND_FROM_2DATEThe begin date of the member's medical condition.
MED_CND_FROM_3DATEThe begin date of the member's medical condition.
MED_CND_THRU_1DATEThe end date of the member's medical condition.
MED_CND_THRU_2DATEThe end date of the member's medical condition.
MED_CND_THRU_3DATEThe end date of the member's medical condition.
MED_EXP_DELIVERY_1DATEDue date for giving birth
MED_EXP_DELIVERY_2DATEDue date for giving birth
MED_EXP_DELIVERY_3DATEDue date for giving birth
MOD_DATEDATEThe date the record was modified.
MOD_TIMEVARCHAR2The time the record was modified.
MOD_USERVARCHAR2The code indicating the user who modified the record.
MP_CITYVARCHAR2The city of the “Medical Payee Address” if present. Otherwise, skip this segment.
MP_DEL_INDVARCHAR2Indicates if there is a Medicare Payee
MP_FNAMEVARCHAR2The first name of the Med-Payee or defaults to primary person in the
case.
MP_LNAMEVARCHAR2The last name of the Med-Payee or defaults to primary person in the
case.
MP_MIDCHARThe middle initial of the Med-Payee or defaults to primary person in the
case.
MP_STATEVARCHAR2The State Code of the “Medical Payee Address” if present.
MP_STREET_ADDR1VARCHAR2The first line of the “Medical Payee Address” if present. Otherwise, skip
this segment.
MP_STREET_ADDR2VARCHAR2The second line of the “Medical Payee Address” if present.
MP_ZIPVARCHAR2The ZIP Code of the “Medical Payee Address” if present.
NH_CODEVARCHAR2Codes for nursing home facility
NH_DEL_INDCHARIndicates to health plans that a nursing home activity have been deleted
NH_DESCVARCHAR2The description of the nursing home code
NH_FROM_DATDATEBegin date for activity/occurrence
NH_LOC_APPROVAL_STAVARCHAR2Used to inform the health plan the client is at high risk
NH_LOC_DEL_INDCHARNursing Home Level of care deletion indicator
NH_LOC_FROMDATEBegin date for activity/occurrence
NH_LOC_NUM_RISK_PTSVARCHAR2Point scale that is used to determine the level of care a member have
NH_LOC_THRUDATEEnd date for activity/occurrence
NH_PENALIZED_DEL_INDCHARAn indicator which usually identifies cases in which the client sold assets to qualify for Medicaid. In these cases, nursing home benefits are not paid, but all other benefits should be paid.
NH_PENALIZED_FROMDATEBegin date for nursing home penalty
NH_PENALIZED_THRUDATEEnd date for nursing home penalty
NH_THRU_DATDATEEnd date for activity/occurrence
NHT_DEL_INDCHARIndicates to health plans that a nursing home track activity have been deleted/inactivated
NHT_REVIEW_DATDATEThe date a nursing home has to be re-evaluated (per RP team: may not be used any longer)
ODS_LOAD_DATEDATEThe date the record was loaded into the data warehouse.
OTH_DEN_FROMDATEDental enrollment effective begin date
OTH_DEN_PLANVARCHAR2Enrollment Dental Plan (Member may not be eligible for Medicaid but MedQuest house the information)
OTH_DEN_THRUDATEDental enrollment effective end date
OTH_MED_FROMDATEEnrollment Begin date (Member may not be eligible for Medicaid but MedQuest house the information)
OTH_MED_PLANVARCHAR2Enrollment Health Plan (Member may not be eligible for Medicaid but MedQuest house the information)
OTH_MED_THRUDATEEnrollment End date (Member may not be eligible for Medicaid but MedQuest house the information)
PMT_AMTNUMBERDollar Amount of Payment for Medicaid benefit as in capitation amount.
PMT_CYCLEVARCHAR2Type of Payment Cycle (Daily, Monthly, Etc.)
PMT_DATDATEPayment Date - The date the voucher was paid
PMT_FROM_DATDATEThe begin date of the payment cycle
PMT_THRU_DATDATEThe end date of the payment cycle
PMT_TYPCHARThe type of benefit payment (Capitation or supplemental payment. )
PN_HP_IDVARCHAR2Health Plan ID of the enrollment
PN_HP_NAMEVARCHAR2Health Plan Name of the enrollment
PREGNANT_INDVARCHAR2Indicates whether the member is pregnant.

individual when corrected
data is reported

data is reported
PRIOR_X12_MSTCHARMarital Status
PRIOR_X12_RACECHARCode indicating the racial background of a person

PROCESS_SEQVARCHAR2per RP Developer: Common Name and Description are unknown
RELATIONSHIP_CDVARCHAR2Code indicating the
relationship between two
individuals or entities.
RENEWAL_DATDATEDate client has to reapply for Medicaid
RISK_GROUPVARCHAR2Per the contracts, risk group is a grouping of rate codes that are paid at the same capitation rate. (DR)
RP_CITYVARCHAR2The City Name of the insured individual or subscriber to the coverage
RP_DOBDATEThe date of birth of the
member to the indicated
coverage or policy

subscriber or dependent
RP_FNAMEVARCHAR2The first name of the
insured individual or
subscriber to the
coverage
RP_LNAMEVARCHAR2The surname of the
insured individual or

coverage

RP_MICHARThe middle name of the
subscriber to the
indicated coverage or
policy
RP_PHONE_NUMVARCHAR2Member's telephone number
RP_SEXCHARA code indicating the gender of the patient or insured

the insured individual or
subscriber to the
coverage

insured individual or
subscriber to the
coverage
SECTIONVARCHAR2The section of the eligibility worker.

SEQCHARper RP Developer: Common Name and Description are unknown
SOFC_AMT_1NUMBERThe amount the recipient must pay before Medicaid begins covering
charges and it applies to Long Term Care (LTC) recipients. Up to three
cost share amounts can appear. Each cost share amount is followed by the cost share begin and end date.
SOFC_AMT_2NUMBERThe amount the recipient must pay before Medicaid begins covering
charges and it applies to Long Term Care (LTC) recipients. Up to three
cost share amounts can appear. Each cost share amount is followed by the cost share begin and end date.
SOFC_AMT_3NUMBERThe amount the recipient must pay before Medicaid begins covering
charges and it applies to Long Term Care (LTC) recipients. Up to three
cost share amounts can appear. Each cost share amount is followed by the cost share begin and end date.
SOFC_AMT_4NUMBERThe amount the recipient must pay before Medicaid begins covering
charges and it applies to Long Term Care (LTC) recipients. Up to three
cost share amounts can appear. Each cost share amount is followed by the cost share begin and end date.
SOFC_AMT_5NUMBERThe amount the recipient must pay before Medicaid begins covering
charges and it applies to Long Term Care (LTC) recipients. Up to three
cost share amounts can appear. Each cost share amount is followed by the cost share begin and end date.
SOFC_AMT_6NUMBERThe amount the recipient must pay before Medicaid begins covering
charges and it applies to Long Term Care (LTC) recipients. Up to three
cost share amounts can appear. Each cost share amount is followed by the cost share begin and end date.
SOFC_DAT_1DATEThe beginning date of the recipient's cost share period for the corresponding cost share amount, in mm/dd/yyyy format.
SOFC_DAT_2DATEThe beginning date of the recipient's cost share period for the corresponding cost share amount, in mm/dd/yyyy format.
SOFC_DAT_3DATEThe beginning date of the recipient's cost share period for the
corresponding cost share amount, in mm/dd/yyyy format.
SOFC_DAT_4DATEThe beginning date of the recipient's cost share period for the
corresponding cost share amount, in mm/dd/yyyy format.
SOFC_DAT_5DATEThe beginning date of the recipient's cost share period for the
corresponding cost share amount, in mm/dd/yyyy format.
SOFC_DAT_6DATEThe beginning date of the recipient's cost share period for the
corresponding cost share amount, in mm/dd/yyyy format.
SSNVARCHAR2The recipient's social security number.
STACHARUsed to indicate if the monthly record has been processed or errored.
UNITVARCHAR2The unit of the eligibility worker.
4/19 Baiyina checking with MQD
VOUCHER_IDVARCHAR2(ACS issues checks when it makes capitation payments on behalf of MQD. Each detailed payment documented on the 820 Transaction has a Voucher Number. The same Voucher Number can be associated with information for multiple members on the 834 Enrollment Transaction. This association makes
it possible for receivers of both 820 and 834 Transactions to audit payments at the member level. )
WORKERVARCHAR2The worker number of the eligibility worker.
X12_ACT_TYPVARCHAR2Code indicating action type of add, change, or delete/disenroll. Code identifying a specific type of item maintenance.
X12_ACTION_CDVARCHAR2Action codes are included on the daily 834 to provide the health plans with additional
transaction information. Identifies, in general, the reason the client is being added to the plan’s membership. Action codes identify the type of information that has been changed. Identifies, in general,
the reason the client is being disenrolled from the plan’s membership.
X12_ETHNICITYVARCHAR2Code indicating the ethnic background of a person.
X12_LANG_READVARCHAR2Code indicating the language read by the recipient.
X12_LANGUAGEVARCHAR2Code to specify language, type of usage, and proficiency or fluency
X12_MARITAL_STACHARCode defining the marital status of a person
X12_RACEVARCHAR2Code indicating the ethnic background of a
person

CAT_INDCHARIndicates whether or not an eligibility is categorical. Federal Funding =Y

CTRT_TYPCHARThis field provides the one character code that is associated with the type(s) of contract a health plan holds with MQD. Contract types indicate a particular population or set of services that a health plan may provide.
ENRLED_MONTHDATENumber of months the recipient has been enrolled.
HP_IDCHARUnique Health Plan ID assigned by DHS MedQUEST.
MBR_MNTHSNUMERICMembership Months
md5_hashVARCHARThe MD5 hash is built off all columns and is to be used with available primary and/or business keys included in the respective file. Is included to simplify any delta loading processes during file imports. row-by-row validation check using the hash bytes MD5 function to compare every character between the source and target tables. The primary objective, apart from confirming matching data, was to identify special characters that would cause issues with data loads.
NUM_DAYSNUMERICNumber of Days
PPC_INDCHARPrior Period Coverage Indicator. Contains either a Yes or No value.
PRI_AHCCCS_IDCHARThe identification number assigned to a recipient of services in the AHCCCS program
RATE_CDCHARDate that the level of care began
RCP_AGECHARThis is the age of the recipient at time of eligibility.
RCP_SEXCHARThis field contains the sex code for an individual. Values are "F" (female) and "M" male
RISK_AGECHARAge of the recipient based on rate code characteristics
RISK_FNDCHARThe funding source for this record
RISK_MDCCHARMedicare Coverage Indicator
RISK_PGMCHARThe eligibility program for the record
RISK_SUBCHARThe Subprogram category based on rate code characteristics
RVN_INDCHARAn indicator of whether or not a native American recipient is living in a reservation zip code. Used in race, tribe and reservation edits.
T_HP_AFL_MQD_SPEC
Column NameColumn AliasData TypeDescription
ADD_DATEDATEThe date the record was added.
CURRENT_INDCHARThis field is created in the DW as well. You will see this field on many RP, HP, and PR tables. The current indicator identifies the latest (or most current) segment for a RP, PR, or HP. For example, if a member has three records on the enrollment table then the current_​ind is set to 'Y' for the segment with the most recent effective dates and the other two records are set to 'N'.
EPSDT_INDCHARIndicates a provider was authorized
to provide EPSDT services to a health plan’s population
HP_IDCHARIndicates submitting health plan. Unique Health Plan ID assigned by DHS MedQUEST.
HP_PR_CTRT_BDDATEEffective date of the health plan’s contract with the provider.
HP_PR_CTRT_EDDATETermination date of the health plan’s contract with the provider
HP_PR_SPECCHARCode classifying the provider by specialty, as associated with the health plan..
HP_PROC_DATDATEHealth Plan Procedure Date
ISLECHARThe recipient's island of residence
LOC_CDCHARCode identifying the payment or service locations of the provider
md5_hashVARCHARThe MD5 hash is built off all columns and is to be used with available primary and/or business keys included in the respective file. Is included to simplify any delta loading processes during file imports. row-by-row validation check using the hash bytes MD5 function to compare every character between the source and target tables. The primary objective, apart from confirming matching data, was to identify special characters that would cause issues with data loads.
MOD_DATEDATEThe date the record was modified.
MOD_TIMECHARThe time the record was modified.
MOD_USERCHARThe code indicating the user who modified the record.
NEW_PAT_INDCHARIndicates if the provider is currently accepting new patient assignments as a pcp, indicator.
ODS_LOAD_DATEDATEThe date the record was loaded into the data warehouse.
PCP_INDCHARShows the provider has been designated as a primary care
provider within the health plan and is eligible to have a PCP relationship with a recipient
PR_IDCHARHealth Plan assigned Provider ID.
PR_NAMEVARCHAR2Provider’s name.
PR_TYPCHARCode classifying the type of services to be rendered by the provider.
PRIMARY_INDCHARIndicator used to designate the specialty identified on this specific record is primary to the provider.
RECIP_CNTNUMBERNumber of recipients assigned to this provider.
RECIP_MAXNUMBERMaximum number of recipients that the provider has agreed to accept.
SPEC_DESCVARCHAR2A description of the provider specialty code.
VALID_ID_INDCHARThis field is created in the DW as a quality check and is likely not in Cognos. Checks the PR_​TYP field to ensure that it contains a 2 character code. If it is 2 characters then 'Y' else 'N'.

BL_INDCHARIndicates the member's race as black

The primary objective, apart from confirming matching data, was to identify special characters that would cause issues with data loads.

RA_INDCHARRefusal Race Indicator
RACE_CDCHARThe code identifying the recipient's race.

UD_INDCHARUndetermined Race Indicator
WH_INDCHARIndicates the member's race as White not of Hispanic origin

ADDR_MATCH_DESCVARCHAR2Recipient Address Correction Description

ATTNCHARThe attention portion of the address used for specific name that receives mail. Free form can be used for any member but primarily for adults with disabilities and children in foster care
CITYCHARThe city portion of the address
CTYCHARCounty code based on home address RF012 county code list health plan assignment uses the home address country code

ON_RESERVATIONCHARA RY or RN indicator of whether or not a native American recipient is living in a reservation zip code. Used in race, tribe and reservation edits and impacts long term enrollment RP135. Used with a special program for enrollment

RURAL_METROCHARValues are Urban or Rural - warehouse value field
SRCCHARThe input source of the data on the record identified with a code value found on RF522
STCHARThe state portion of the address two letter state code
STR_1CHARFirst line of street address
STR_2CHARSecond line of street address
ZIP4CHARThe last 4 digits of the zip code after the first 5 digits and they are optional
ZIP5CHARThe first 5 digits of the zip code

Column NameColumn AliasData TypeDescription
AHCCCS_IDVARCHAR2The identification number assigned to a recipient of services MQD in the AHCCCS program
CIS_BEG_DATHomeless Begin Date / CIS Begin Date (confirming CISDATEthe date the member became that particular level of homeless
CIS_CDVARCHAR2A variable whose values allow for tracking of beneficiaries throughout their engagement with and participation in various aspects of the CIS program. A code that recipient's current CIS program beneficiary status.
CIS_END_DATHomeless End Date / CIS End DateDATEthe date the member ended that particular level of homeless
CURRENT_INDVARCHAR2Warehouse value field. Indicates whether or not this is the most current segment. The field should only be utilized when trying to access the most current (date based) segment. When attaching to a claim or encounter, the from date of service should be utilized from the claim/encounter.

The primary objective, apart from confirming matching data, was to identify special characters that would cause issues with data loads.

TIME_REC_ADDEDVARCHAR2The time the CIS record was added.
USR_REC_ADDEDVARCHAR2Code indicating the user that added the record.

CTY_THRU_DATDATEThe end date the county was effective for the recipient based on residence.
CTY_TYPCHARThe type of county for a recipient. Valid values are r (residence) or f (fiscal)
CURRENT_INDCHARWarehouse value field. Indicates whether or not this is the most current segment. The field should only be utilized when trying to access the most current (date based) segment. Column NameColumn AliasData TypeDescription
AHCCCS_IDNCHARThe identification number assigned to a recipient of services MQD in the AHCCCS program
CASE_IDNCHARA unique number to group recipients in one household group
CITIZEN_CDNCHARCitizenship Code
CITIZEN_SRCNCHARCitizenship Code Source
DAT_OF_BIRDATEA recipients date of birth. Date of birth is used as part of the duplicate check criteria. A change in date of birth may affect eligibility and enrollment. Date of birth is an updatable field
DAT_OF_DTHDATEThis field contains the date of the identified individual's death
DAT_REC_ADDEDDATEThe original date for when the demographics was added to the table
DEST_CDNCHARper Baiyina, unknown to RP developers
EMG_PHONCHARThis field is the emergency phone number associated with this entity
FIRST_NAMENCHARThe recipient's first name
HHO_INDNCHARIndicates whether or not a recipient is the head of household for a case. Mailings are sent to a head of household of a case.
LANGNCHARThe language code of a recipient. values can be found RF514
LAST_MOD_DATDATEThe date for when the demographics was last modified
LAST_NAMENCHARThe recipient's last name
md5_hashVARCHARThe MD5 hash is built off all columns and is to be used with available primary and/or business keys included in the respective file. Is included to simplify any delta loading processes during file imports. row-by-row validation check using the hash bytes MD5 function to compare every character between the source and target tables. The primary objective, apart from confirming matching data, was to identify special characters that would cause issues with data loads.
MIDDLE_INITNCHARThe recipient's middle initial
MSTNCHARMarital status of a recipient.
ODS_LOAD_DATDATEThe date the record was loaded into the data warehouse.
PHONCHARThis field is the telephone number associated with this entity
PRI_AHCCCS_IDNCHARThe identification number assigned to a recipient of services in the AHCCCS program
RACENCHARThe race code of a recipient. Two letter code with Values RF518
RACE_MOD_DATDATELast date race was changed
REL_CDNCHARThis field is used by HPMMIS to indicate the relationship of the recipient to the primary insured member
RSLN_BEG_DATDATEThe date a duplicate recipient record was resolved
RSLN_END_DATDATEThe date a duplicate recipient record was end dated
RVN_INDNCHARAn indicator of whether or not a native American recipient is living in a reservation zip code. Used in race, tribe and reservation edits.
SEXNCHARThis field contains the sex code for an individual. Values are f for female and m for male
SRCNCHARThe input source of the data on the record identified with a code value found on RF522
TRIBE_IDNCHARThe tribe id of a recipient and verified with programs with a premium
VIS_ACOM_CDNCHARThis Visual Accommodation flag that is not used by Hawaii. AZ Medicaid has a visual accommodation indicator on our member record in the source system that has these codes with a description. The only way to tell about these categories is by the eligibility code assigned to the member.

Column NameColumn AliasData TypeDescription
AHCCCS_IDCHARThe identification number assigned to a recipient of services MQD in the AHCCCS program
CHG_RSNCHARThe reason the record was changed.

CTY_SER_AREA_CDCHARA code identifying the county service area.

LAST_MOD_TIMECHARThe time the data for the recipient’s dental enrollment was last modified in the AHCCCS system.
LAST_MOD_USRCHARThe data for when the user was changed for the recipient’s dental enrollment was last modified in the AHCCCS system.

Is included to simplify any delta loading processes during file imports. row-by-row validation check using the hash bytes MD5 function to compare every character between the source and target tables. The primary objective, apart from confirming matching data, was to identify special characters that would cause issues with data loads.

RATE_CDDental Rate CodeCHARCapitated Rate Code for dental enrollment period
