PROV-ATTRIBUTES-MAIN
Column NameBusiness NameStartEndData TypeDescription
RECORD-IDRecord ID18VarcharThe Record ID represents the type of segment being reported. The Record ID communicates how the contents of a
given row of data should be interpreted depending on which segment type the Record ID represents. Each type of
segment collects different data elements so each segment type has a distinct layout. The first 3 characters identify
the relevant file (e.g., ELG, PRV, CIP, etc.). The last 5 digits are the segment identifier padded with leading zeros (e.g.,
00001, 00002, 00003, etc.).
SUBMITTING-STATESubmitting State910VarcharA code that uniquely identifies the U.S. State or Territory from which T-MSIS system data resources were received.
RECORD-NUMBERRecord Number1121NumA sequential number assigned by the submitter to identify each record segment row in the submission file. The Record Number, in conjunction with the Record Identifier, uniquely identifies a single record within the submission file.
SUBMITTING-STATE-PROV-IDSubmitting State Provider ID2251VarcharThe State-specific Medicaid Provider Identifier is a state-assigned unique identifier that states should report with all individual providers, practice groups, facilities, and other entities. This should be the identifier that is used in the state's Medicaid Management Information System.
PROV-ATTRIBUTES-EFF-DATEProvider Attributes Effective Date5259DateThe first calendar day on which all of the other data elements in the same segment were effective.
PROV-ATTRIBUTES-END-DATEProvider Attributes End Date6067DateThe last calendar day on which all of the other data elements in the same segment were effective.
PROV-DOING-BUSINESS-AS-NAMEProvider DBA Name68167CharThe provider's name that is commonly used by the public when the "doing-business-as" name is different than the legal name. DBA is an abbreviation for "doing business as." Registering a DBA is required to operate a business under a name that differs from the company's legal
name. If DBA name is the same as the legal name, do not populate DBA name.
PROV-LEGAL-NAMEProvider Legal Name168267CharThe name as it appears on the provider agreement between the state and the entity. Both persons and other entities
can have a legal name.
PROV-ORGANIZATION-NAMEProvider Organization Name268327CharThe name of the provider when the provider is an organization. If the provider organization name exceeds 60 characters submit only the first 60 characters of the name.
PROV-TAX-NAMEProvider Tax Name328427CharThe name that the provider entity uses on IRS filings.
FACILITY-GROUP-INDIVIDUAL-CODEFacility Group Individual Code428429NumA code to identify whether the Submitting State Provider Identifier is assigned to an individual, group, or a facility.
TEACHING-INDTeaching Indicator430430NumA code indicating if the provider's organization is a teaching facility.
PROV-FIRST-NAMEProvider First Name431460CharIndividual's first name; first name component of full name (e.g. First Name, Middle Initial, Last Name).
PROV-MIDDLE-INITIALProvider Middle Initial461461CharIndividual's middle initial; middle initial component of full name (e.g. First Name, Middle Initial, Last Name).
PROV-LAST-NAMEProvider Last Name462491CharIndividual's last name; last name component of full name (e.g. First Name, Middle Initial, Last Name).
SEXSex492492CharEither individual's biological sex or their self-identified sex.
OWNERSHIP-CODEOwnership Code493494NumA code denoting the ownership interest and/or managing control information. The valid values list is a Medicare standard list.
PROV-PROFIT-STATUSProvider Profit Status495496NumA code denoting the profit status of the provider.
DATE-OF-BIRTHDate of Birth497504DateAn individual's date of birth.
DATE-OF-DEATHDate of Death505512DateThe date an individual died on.
ACCEPTING-NEW-PATIENTS-INDAccepting New Patients Indicator513513NumAn indicator to identify providers who are accepting new patients.
STATE-NOTATIONState Notation5141013VarcharA free text field for the submitting state to enter whatever information it chooses.

SUBMITTING-STATESubmitting State910VarcharA code that uniquely identifies the U.S. State or Territory from which T-MSIS system data resources were received.
RECORD-NUMBERRecord Number1121NumA sequential number assigned by the submitter to identify each record segment row in the submission file. The Record Number, in conjunction with the Record Identifier, uniquely identifies a single record within the submission file.
SUBMITTING-STATE-PROV-IDSubmitting State Provider ID2251VarcharThe State-specific Medicaid Provider Identifier is a state-assigned unique identifier that states should report with all individual providers, practice groups, facilities, and other entities. This should be the identifier that is used in the state's Medicaid Management Information System.
PROV-LOCATION-IDProvider Location ID5256VarcharA code to uniquely identify the geographic location where the provider's services were performed. The Provider Location Identifier values reported on Inpatient, Long-Term Care, Other, and Pharmacy Claim Header Segments must correspond to an active Provider Location Identifier
value on a Provider Location and Contact Info (PRV.003) segment. If a particular license (e.g., a physician's medical license) or provider identifier (e.g., an individual provider's NPI or SSN) is applicable to all of their servicing locations, value "000" (a string of exactly three zeros) can
be used in the PRV.004 or PRV.005, respectively, to represent all locations, however that location identifier must not be attributed to claims or provider bed type info.
PROV-LOCATION-AND-CONTACT-INFO-EFF-DATEProvider Location &amp; Contact Info Effective Date5764DateThe first calendar day on which all of the other data elements in the same segment were effective.
PROV-LOCATION-AND-CONTACT-INFO-END-DATEProvider Location &amp; Contact Info End Date6572DateThe last calendar day on which all of the other data elements in the same segment were effective.
ADDR-TYPEProvider Address Type7373NumThe type of address and contact information for the provider submitted in the record segment.
ADDR-LN1Provider Address Line 174133VarcharThe first line of a potentially multi-line physical street or mailing address for a given entity (e.g. person, organization, agency, etc.).
ADDR-LN2Provider Address Line 2134193VarcharThe second line of a multi-line physical street or mailing address for a given entity (e.g. person, organization, agency, etc.).
ADDR-LN3Provider Address Line 3194253VarcharThe third line of a multi-line physical street or mailing address for a given entity (e.g. person, organization, agency, etc.).
ADDR-CITYProvider City254281CharThe city component of an address associated with a given entity (e.g. person, organization, agency, etc.).
ADDR-STATEProvider State282283VarcharThe ANSI numeric state code component of an address associated with a given entity (e.g. person, organization, agency, etc.)
ADDR-ZIP-CODEProvider ZIP Code284292NumU.S. ZIP Code component of an address associated with a given entity (e.g. person, organization, agency, etc.)
ADDR-TELEPHONEProvider Phone Number293302NumPhone number for a given entity (e.g. person, organization, agency).
ADDR-EMAILProvider Address Email303362VarcharThe email address of the provider for the location being captured on this record
ADDR-FAX-NUMProvider Address Fax363372NumThe fax number of the provider for the location being captured on this record.
ADDR-BORDER-STATE-INDAddress Border State Indicator373373NumA code identify an out of state provider enrolled with the state (The provider location is out of state, but for payment purposes the provider is treated as an in-state provider.)
ADDR-COUNTYProvider County Code374376VarcharStandard ANSI code used to identify a specific U.S. County.
STATE-NOTATIONState Notation377876VarcharA free text field for the submitting state to enter whatever information it chooses.
FillerVarcharSpace Filler for File Format
PROV-LICENSING-INFO
Column NameBusiness NameStartEndData TypeDescription
RECORD-IDRecord ID18VarcharThe Record ID represents the type of segment being reported. The Record ID communicates how the contents of a
given row of data should be interpreted depending on which segment type the Record ID represents. Each type of
segment collects different data elements so each segment type has a distinct layout. The first 3 characters identify
the relevant file (e.g., ELG, PRV, CIP, etc.). The last 5 digits are the segment identifier padded with leading zeros (e.g.,
00001, 00002, 00003, etc.).
SUBMITTING-STATESubmitting State910VarcharA code that uniquely identifies the U.S. State or Territory from which T-MSIS system data resources were received.
RECORD-NUMBERRecord Number1121NumA sequential number assigned by the submitter to identify each record segment row in the submission file. The Record Number, in conjunction with the Record Identifier, uniquely identifies a single record within the submission file.
SUBMITTING-STATE-PROV-IDSubmitting State Provider ID2251VarcharThe State-specific Medicaid Provider Identifier is a state-assigned unique identifier that states should report with all individual providers, practice groups, facilities, and other entities. This should be the identifier that is used in the state's Medicaid Management Information System.
PROV-LOCATION-IDProvider Location ID5256VarcharA code to uniquely identify the geographic location where the provider's services were performed. The Provider Location Identifier values reported on Inpatient, Long-Term Care, Other, and Pharmacy Claim Header Segments must correspond to an active Provider Location Identifier
value on a Provider Location and Contact Info (PRV.003) segment. If a particular license (e.g., a physician's medical license) or provider identifier (e.g., an individual provider's NPI or SSN) is applicable to all of their servicing locations, value "000" (a string of exactly three zeros) can
be used in the PRV.004 or PRV.005, respectively, to represent all locations, however that location identifier must not be attributed to claims or provider bed type info.
PROV-LICENSE-EFF-DATEProvider License Effective Date5764DateThe first calendar day on which all of the other data elements in the same segment were effective.
PROV-LICENSE-END-DATEProvider License End Date6572DateThe last calendar day on which all of the other data elements in the same segment were effective.
LICENSE-TYPELicense Type7373NumA code to identify the kind of license or accreditation number that is captured in the License or Accreditation Number data element.
LICENSE-ISSUING-ENTITY-IDLicense Issuing Entity ID74133VarcharA free text field to capture the identity of the entity issuing the license or accreditation. Enter the applicable state code, county code, municipality
name, "DEA", professional society's name, or the CLIA accreditation body's name.
-If associated License Type is equal to 1 and issuing authority is a State, then value must be ANSI State abbreviation code.
- If associated License Type is equal to 1 and issuing authority is a county, then value must be a 5-digit, concatenated code consisting of the ANSI
state code plus the ANSI county code. A list of codes can be found here:
https://www.nrcs.usda.gov/wps/portal/nrcs/detail/national/home/?cid=nrcs143_​013697
- If associated License Type is equal to 1 and issuing authority is a municipality, then enter a text string with the name of the municipality.
-If associated License Type is equal to 3, then enter the text string identifying the professional society issuing the accreditation.
-If associated License Type is equal to 4, then value must be the text string identifying the CLIA accreditation body's name.
LICENSE-OR-ACCREDITATION-NUMBERLicense or Accreditation Number134153CharA data element to capture the license or accreditation number issued to the provider by the licensing entity or accreditation body identified in the License Issuing Entity ID data element.
STATE-NOTATIONState Notation154653VarcharA free text field for the submitting state to enter whatever information it chooses.
FillerFillerVarcharSpace Filler for File Format
PROV-IDENTIFIERS
Column NameBusiness NameStartEndData TypeDescription
RECORD-IDRecord ID18VarcharThe Record ID represents the type of segment being reported. The Record ID communicates how the contents of a
given row of data should be interpreted depending on which segment type the Record ID represents. Each type of
segment collects different data elements so each segment type has a distinct layout. The first 3 characters identify
the relevant file (e.g., ELG, PRV, CIP, etc.). The last 5 digits are the segment identifier padded with leading zeros (e.g.,
00001, 00002, 00003, etc.).
SUBMITTING-STATESubmitting State910VarcharA code that uniquely identifies the U.S. State or Territory from which T-MSIS system data resources were received.
RECORD-NUMBERRecord Number1121NumA sequential number assigned by the submitter to identify each record segment row in the submission file. The Record Number, in conjunction with the Record Identifier, uniquely identifies a single record within the submission file.
SUBMITTING-STATE-PROV-IDSubmitting State Provider ID2251VarcharThe State-specific Medicaid Provider Identifier is a state-assigned unique identifier that states should report with all individual providers, practice groups, facilities, and other entities. This should be the identifier that is used in the state's Medicaid Management Information System.
PROV-LOCATION-IDProvider Location ID5256VarcharA code to uniquely identify the geographic location where the provider's services were performed. The Provider Location Identifier values reported on Inpatient, Long-Term Care, Other, and Pharmacy Claim Header Segments must correspond to an active Provider Location Identifier
value on a Provider Location and Contact Info (PRV.003) segment. If a particular license (e.g., a physician's medical license) or provider identifier (e.g., an individual provider's NPI or SSN) is applicable to all of their servicing locations, value "000" (a string of exactly three zeros) can
be used in the PRV.004 or PRV.005, respectively, to represent all locations, however that location identifier must not be attributed to claims or provider bed type info.
PROV-IDENTIFIER-TYPEProvider Identifier Type5757NumA code to identify the kind of provider identifier that is captured in the Provider Identifier data element. The state should
submit updates to T-MSIS whenever an identifier is retired or issued. see Provider Identifier Type List (VVL.146)
PROV-IDENTIFIER-ISSUING-ENTITY-IDProvider Identifier Issuing Entity ID5875VarcharA free text field to capture the identity of the entity that issued the provider identifier in the Provider Identifier (PRV.005.081) data element. For (State Tax ID), if associated Provider Identifier Type (PRV.005.077) value is equal to 6, then value must be the name of the state's taxation
division. For (Other), if associated Provider Identifier Type (PRV.005.077) value is equal to 8, then value must be the name of the entity that issued the identifier.
PROV-IDENTIFIER-EFF-DATEProvider Identifier Effective Date7683DateThe first calendar day on which all of the other data elements in the same segment were effective.
PROV-IDENTIFIER-END-DATEProvider Identifier End Date8491DateThe last calendar day on which all of the other data elements in the same segment were effective.
PROV-IDENTIFIERProvider Identifier92121VarcharA data element to capture the various ways used to distinguish providers from one another on claims and other interactions between providers and other entities. The specific type of identifier is defined in the corresponding value in the Provider Identifier Type data element.
STATE-NOTATIONState Notation122621VarcharA free text field for the submitting state to enter whatever information it chooses.
FillerFillerVarcharSpace Filler for File Format
PROV-TAXONOMY-CLASSIFICATION
Column NameBusiness NameStartEndData TypeDescription
RECORD-IDRecord ID18VarcharThe Record ID represents the type of segment being reported. The Record ID communicates how the contents of a
given row of data should be interpreted depending on which segment type the Record ID represents. Each type of
segment collects different data elements so each segment type has a distinct layout. The first 3 characters identify
the relevant file (e.g., ELG, PRV, CIP, etc.). The last 5 digits are the segment identifier padded with leading zeros (e.g.,
00001, 00002, 00003, etc.).
SUBMITTING-STATESubmitting State910VarcharA code that uniquely identifies the U.S. State or Territory from which T-MSIS system data resources were received.
RECORD-NUMBERRecord Number1121NumA sequential number assigned by the submitter to identify each record segment row in the submission file. The Record Number, in conjunction with the Record Identifier, uniquely identifies a single record within the submission file.
SUBMITTING-STATE-PROV-IDSubmitting State Provider ID2251VarcharThe State-specific Medicaid Provider Identifier is a state-assigned unique identifier that states should report with all individual providers, practice groups, facilities, and other entities. This should be the identifier that is used in the state's Medicaid Management Information System.
PROV-CLASSIFICATION-TYPEProvider Classification Type5252NumA code to identify the schema used in the Provider Classification Code field to categorize providers. See T-MSIS Guidance Document, 'CMS Guidance: Best Practice for Reporting Provider Classification Type and Provider Classification Code in the T-MSIS Provider File' https://www.medicaid.gov/medicaid/data-and-systems/macbis/tmsis/tmsis-blog/98581 . A provider may be reported with multiple active record segments with the same Provider Classification Type if different Provider Classification Code values apply.
PROV-CLASSIFICATION-CODEProvider Classification Code5372VarcharThe code values from the categorization schema identified in the Provider Classification Type data element. Note: States should apply these classification schemas consistently across all providers.
PROV-TAXONOMY-CLASSIFICATION-EFF-DATEProvider Taxonomy Classification Effective Date7380DateThe first calendar day on which all of the other data elements in the same segment were effective.
PROV-TAXONOMY-CLASSIFICATION-END-DATEProvider Taxonomy Classification End Date8188DateThe last calendar day on which all of the other data elements in the same segment were effective.
STATE-NOTATIONState Notation89588VarcharA free text field for the submitting state to enter whatever information it chooses.
FillerVarcharSpace Filler for File Format
PROV-MEDICAID-ENROLLMENT
Column NameBusiness NameStartEndData TypeDescription
RECORD-IDRecord ID18VarcharThe Record ID represents the type of segment being reported. The Record ID communicates how the contents of a
given row of data should be interpreted depending on which segment type the Record ID represents. Each type of
segment collects different data elements so each segment type has a distinct layout. The first 3 characters identify
the relevant file (e.g., ELG, PRV, CIP, etc.). The last 5 digits are the segment identifier padded with leading zeros (e.g.,
00001, 00002, 00003, etc.).
SUBMITTING-STATESubmitting State910VarcharA code that uniquely identifies the U.S. State or Territory from which T-MSIS system data resources were received.
RECORD-NUMBERRecord Number1121NumA sequential number assigned by the submitter to identify each record segment row in the submission file. The Record Number, in conjunction with the Record Identifier, uniquely identifies a single record within the submission file.
SUBMITTING-STATE-PROV-IDSubmitting State Provider ID2251VarcharThe State-specific Medicaid Provider Identifier is a state-assigned unique identifier that states should report with all individual providers, practice groups, facilities, and other entities. This should be the identifier that is used in the state's Medicaid Management Information System.
PROV-MEDICAID-EFF-DATEProvider Medicaid Effective Date5259DateThe first calendar day on which all of the other data elements in the same segment were effective.
PROV-MEDICAID-END-DATEProvider Medicaid End Date6067DateThe last calendar day on which all of the other data elements in the same segment were effective.
PROV-MEDICAID-ENROLLMENT-STATUS-CODEProvider Medicaid Enrollment Status Code6869NumA code representing the provider's Medicaid and/or CHIP enrollment status for the time span specified by the Provider Medicaid Effective Date and Provider Medicaid End Date data elements. Note: The State Plan Enrollment data element identifies whether the provider is enrolled in Medicaid, CHIP, or both.
STATE-PLAN-ENROLLMENTState Plan Enrollment7070NumThe state plan with which a provider has an affiliation and is able to provide services to the state's fee for service enrollees.
PROV-ENROLLMENT-METHODProvider Enrollment Method7171NumProcess by which a provider was enrolled in Medicaid or CHIP.
APPL-DATEApplication Date7279NumThe date on which the provider applied for enrollment into the State's Medicaid and/or CHIP program.
STATE-NOTATIONState Notation80579VarcharA free text field for the submitting state to enter whatever information it chooses.
FillerFillerVarcharSpace Filler for File Format

Column NameBusiness NameStartEndData TypeDescription
RECORD-IDRecord ID18VarcharThe Record ID represents the type of segment being reported. The Record ID communicates how the contents of a
given row of data should be interpreted depending on which segment type the Record ID represents. Each type of
segment collects different data elements so each segment type has a distinct layout. The first 3 characters identify

This should be the identifier that is used in the state's Medicaid Management Information System.
SUBMITTING-STATE-PROV-ID-OF-AFFILIATED-ENTITYSubmitting State Provider ID of Affiliated Entity5281VarcharThe unique, state-assigned identification number for the group or subpart with which the individual or subpart is associated. (The submitting state's unique identifier for the group. (Note: The group will also be in the provider data set as a provider (i.e., the group-as-a-provider).
PROV-AFFILIATED-GROUP-EFF-DATEProvider Affiliated Group Effective Date8289DateThe first calendar day on which all of the other data elements in the same segment were effective.
PROV-AFFILIATED-GROUP-END-DATEProvider Affiliated Group End Date9097DateThe last calendar day on which all of the other data elements in the same segment were effective.
STATE-NOTATIONState Notation98597VarcharA free text field for the submitting state to enter whatever information it chooses.

segment collects different data elements so each segment type has a distinct layout. The first 3 characters identify

This should be the identifier that is used in the state's Medicaid Management Information System.
AFFILIATED-PROGRAM-TYPEAffiliated Program Type5252NumA code to identify the category of program that the provider is affiliated.
AFFILIATED-PROGRAM-IDAffiliated Program ID53102VarcharA data element to identify the Medicaid/CHIP programs, waivers and demonstrations in which the provider participates.
PROV-AFFILIATED-PROGRAM-EFF-DATEProvider Affiliated Program Effective Date103110DateThe first calendar day on which all of the other data elements in the same segment were effective.
PROV-AFFILIATED-PROGRAM-END-DATEProvider Affiliated Program End Date111118DateThe last calendar day on which all of the other data elements in the same segment were effective.

PROV-BED-TYPE-INFO
Column NameBusiness NameStartEndData TypeDescription
RECORD-IDRecord ID18VarcharThe Record ID represents the type of segment being reported. The Record ID communicates how the contents of a
given row of data should be interpreted depending on which segment type the Record ID represents. Each type of
segment collects different data elements so each segment type has a distinct layout. The first 3 characters identify
the relevant file (e.g., ELG, PRV, CIP, etc.). The last 5 digits are the segment identifier padded with leading zeros (e.g.,
00001, 00002, 00003, etc.).
SUBMITTING-STATESubmitting State910VarcharA code that uniquely identifies the U.S. State or Territory from which T-MSIS system data resources were received.
RECORD-NUMBERRecord Number1121NumA sequential number assigned by the submitter to identify each record segment row in the submission file. The Record Number, in conjunction with the Record Identifier, uniquely identifies a single record within the submission file.
SUBMITTING-STATE-PROV-IDSubmitting State Provider ID2251VarcharThe State-specific Medicaid Provider Identifier is a state-assigned unique identifier that states should report with all individual providers, practice groups, facilities, and other entities. This should be the identifier that is used in the state's Medicaid Management Information System.
PROV-LOCATION-IDProvider Location ID5256VarcharA code to uniquely identify the geographic location where the provider's services were performed. The Provider Location Identifier values reported on Inpatient, Long-Term Care, Other, and Pharmacy Claim Header Segments must correspond to an active Provider Location Identifier
value on a Provider Location and Contact Info (PRV.003) segment. If a particular license (e.g., a physician's medical license) or provider identifier (e.g., an individual provider's NPI or SSN) is applicable to all of their servicing locations, value "000" (a string of exactly three zeros) can
be used in the PRV.004 or PRV.005, respectively, to represent all locations, however that location identifier must not be attributed to claims or provider bed type info.
BED-TYPE-EFF-DATEBed Type Effective Date5764DateThe first calendar day on which all of the other data elements in the same segment were effective.
BED-TYPE-END-DATEBed Type End Date6572DateThe last calendar day on which all of the other data elements in the same segment were effective.
BED-TYPE-CODEBed Type Code7373NumA code to classify beds available at a facility.
BED-COUNTBed Count7478NumA count of the number of beds available at the facility for the category of bed identified in the Bed Type Code data element. Beds should not be counted twice under different bed types. See T-MSIS Guidance Document, "CMS Guidance: Best Practice for Reporting Provider Bed
Information in the T-MSIS Provider File" https://www.medicaid.gov/medicaid/data-and-systems/macbis/tmsis/tmsis-blog/entry/47561
FillerFiller5791100VarcharSpace Filler for File Format
STATE-NOTATIONState Notation79578VarcharA free text field for the submitting state to enter whatever information it chooses.
FILE-HEADER-RECORD-TPL
Column NameBusiness NameStartEndData TypeDescription
RECORD-IDRecord ID18VarcharThe Record ID represents the type of segment being reported. The Record ID communicates how the contents of a
given row of data should be interpreted depending on which segment type the Record ID represents. Each type of
segment collects different data elements so each segment type has a distinct layout. The first 3 characters identify
the relevant file (e.g., ELG, PRV, CIP, etc.). The last 5 digits are the segment identifier padded with leading zeros (e.g.,
00001, 00002, 00003, etc.).
DATA-DICTIONARY-VERSIONData Dictionary Version918VarcharA data element to capture the version of the T-MSIS data dictionary that was used to build the file. Use the version number specified on the Cover Sheet of the data dictionary".
SUBMISSION-TRANSACTION-TYPESubmission Transaction Type1919CharA data element to identify the whether the transactions in the file are original submissions of the data, a resubmission of a previously submitted file, or corrections of edit rejects.
FILE-ENCODING-SPECIFICATIONFile Encoding Specification2022CharDenotes which supported file encoding standard was used to create the file.
DATA-MAPPING-DOCUMENT-VERSIONData Mapping Document Version2331CharIdentifies the version of the T-MSIS data mapping document used to build a state submission file. Use the version number specified on the title page of the data mapping document
FILE-NAMEFile Name3239CharA code to identify the subject area to which the records in its file relate. Each T-MSIS submission file should only
contain records for one subject area (i.e., Eligible, Third-party liability, Provider, Managed Care Plan Information,
Inpatient, Long-Term Care, Other, and Pharmacy Claim).
SUBMITTING-STATESubmitting State4041VarcharA code that uniquely identifies the U.S. State or Territory from which T-MSIS system data resources were received.
DATE-FILE-CREATEDDate File Created4249DateThe date on which the file was created.
START-OF-TIME-PERIODStart of Time Period5057DateThis value must be the first day of the reporting month, regardless of the actual date span of the data in the file.
END-OF-TIME-PERIODEnd of Time Period5865DateThis value must be the last day of the reporting month, regardless of the actual date span.
FILE-STATUS-INDICATORFile Status Indicator6666CharA code to indicate whether the records in the file are test or production records.
SSN-INDICATORSSN Indicator6767NumIndicates whether the state uses the eligible person's social security number instead of an MSIS Identification Number as the unique, unchanging eligible person identifier. A state's SSN/Non-SSN designation on the eligibility file should match on the claims and third party liability
files.
TOT-REC-CNTTotal Record Count6878NumA count of all records in the file except for the file header record. This count will be used as a control total to help assure that the file did not become corrupted during transmission.
STATE-NOTATIONState Notation83582VarcharA free text field for the submitting state to enter whatever information it chooses.
FillerVarcharSpace Filler for File Format
SEQUENCE-NUMBERSequence Number7982NumTo enable states to sequentially number files, when related, follow-on files are necessary (i.e., update files,
replacement files). This should begin with 1 for the original Create submission type and be incremented by one for
each Replacement or Update submission for the same reporting period and file type (subject area).
TPL-MEDICAID-ELIGIBLE-PERSON-MAIN
Column NameBusiness NameStartEndData TypeDescription
RECORD-IDRecord ID18VarcharThe Record ID represents the type of segment being reported. The Record ID communicates how the contents of a
given row of data should be interpreted depending on which segment type the Record ID represents. Each type of
segment collects different data elements so each segment type has a distinct layout. The first 3 characters identify
the relevant file (e.g., ELG, PRV, CIP, etc.). The last 5 digits are the segment identifier padded with leading zeros (e.g.,
00001, 00002, 00003, etc.).
SUBMITTING-STATESubmitting State910VarcharA code that uniquely identifies the U.S. State or Territory from which T-MSIS system data resources were received.
RECORD-NUMBERRecord Number1121NumA sequential number assigned by the submitter to identify each record segment row in the submission file. The Record Number, in conjunction with the Record Identifier, uniquely identifies a single record within the submission file.
MSIS-IDENTIFICATION-NUMMSIS Identification Number2241NumA state-assigned unique identification number used to identify a Medicaid/CHIP enrolled individual (except on service tracking payments). Value may be an SSN, temporary SSN or State-assigned eligible individual identifier.

MSIS Identification Numbers are a unique "key" value used to maintain referential integrity of data distributed over multiples files, segments and reporting periods.

See T-MSIS Guidance Document, "CMS Guidance: Reporting Shared MSIS Identification Numbers" for information on reporting the MSIS Identification Numbers ID for pregnant women, unborn children, mothers, and their deemed newborns younger than 1 year of age who share the
same MSIS Identification Number.
https://www.medicaid.gov/medicaid/data-and-systems/macbis/tmsis/tmsis-blog/entry/47572
TPL-HEALTH-INSURANCE-COVERAGE-INDTPL Health Insurance Coverage Indicator4242NumA flag to indicate that the Medicaid/CHIP eligible person has some form of third party insurance coverage.
TPL-OTHER-COVERAGE-INDTPL Other Coverage Indicator4343NumA flag to indicate that the Medicaid/CHIP eligible person has some other form of third party funding besides insurance coverage.
ELIGIBLE-FIRST-NAMEEligible First Name4473CharThe first name of the individual to whom the services were provided.
ELIGIBLE-MIDDLE-INITEligible Middle Initial7474CharIndividual's middle initial; middle initial component of full name (e.g. First Name, Middle Initial, Last Name).
ELIGIBLE-LAST-NAMEEligible Last Name75104CharThe last name of the individual to whom the services were provided.
ELIG-PRSN-MAIN-EFF-DATEEligible Person Main Effective Date105112Date The first calendar day on which all of the other data elements in the same segment were effective.
ELIG-PRSN-MAIN-END-DATEEligible Person Main End Date113120Date The last calendar day on which all of the other data elements in the same segment were effective.
STATE-NOTATIONState Notation121620VarcharA free text field for the submitting state to enter whatever information it chooses.
FillerVarcharSpace Filler for File Format
TPL-MEDICAID-ELIGIBLE-PERSON-HEALTH-INSURANCE-COVERAGE-INFO
Column NameBusiness NameStartEndData TypeDescription
RECORD-IDRecord ID18VarcharThe Record ID represents the type of segment being reported. The Record ID communicates how the contents of a
given row of data should be interpreted depending on which segment type the Record ID represents. Each type of
segment collects different data elements so each segment type has a distinct layout. The first 3 characters identify
the relevant file (e.g., ELG, PRV, CIP, etc.). The last 5 digits are the segment identifier padded with leading zeros (e.g.,
00001, 00002, 00003, etc.).
SUBMITTING-STATESubmitting State910VarcharA code that uniquely identifies the U.S. State or Territory from which T-MSIS system data resources were received.
RECORD-NUMBERRecord Number1121NumA sequential number assigned by the submitter to identify each record segment row in the submission file. The Record Number, in conjunction with the Record Identifier, uniquely identifies a single record within the submission file.
MSIS-IDENTIFICATION-NUMMSIS Identification Number2241NumA state-assigned unique identification number used to identify a Medicaid/CHIP enrolled individual (except on service tracking payments). Value may be an SSN, temporary SSN or State-assigned eligible individual identifier.

MSIS Identification Numbers are a unique "key" value used to maintain referential integrity of data distributed over multiples files, segments and reporting periods.

See T-MSIS Guidance Document, "CMS Guidance: Reporting Shared MSIS Identification Numbers" for information on reporting the MSIS Identification Numbers ID for pregnant women, unborn children, mothers, and their deemed newborns younger than 1 year of age who share the
same MSIS Identification Number.
https://www.medicaid.gov/medicaid/data-and-systems/macbis/tmsis/tmsis-blog/entry/47572
INSURANCE-CARRIER-ID-NUMInsurance Carrier ID Number4253CharThe state-assigned identification number of the Third Party Liability (TPL) Entity.
INSURANCE-PLAN-IDInsurance Plan ID5473CharThe ID number issued by the Insurance carrier providing third party liability insurance coverage to beneficiaries. Typically the Plan ID/Plan Number is on the beneficiaries' insurance card.
GROUP-NUMGroup Number7489VarcharThe group number of the TPL health insurance policy.
MEMBER-IDMember ID90109VarcharMember identification number as it appears on the card issued by the TPL insurance carrier.
INSURANCE-PLAN-TYPEInsurance Plan Type110111NumCode to classify the type of insurance plan providing TPL coverage.
ANNUAL-DEDUCTIBLE-AMTAnnual Deductible Amount114126NumAnnual amount paid each year by the enrollee in the plan before a health plan benefit begins.
POLICY-OWNER-FIRST-NAMEPolicy Owner First Name127156CharIndividual's first name; first name component of full name (e.g. First Name, Middle Initial, Last Name).
POLICY-OWNER-LAST-NAMEPolicy Owner Last Name157186CharIndividual's last name; last name component of full name (e.g. First Name, Middle Initial, Last Name).
POLICY-OWNER-SSNPolicy Owner SSN187195NumUnique identifier issued to an individual by the SSA for the purpose of identification.
POLICY-OWNER-CODEPolicy Owner Code196197NumThis code identifies the relationship of the policy holder to the Medicaid/CHIP beneficiary.
INSURANCE-COVERAGE-EFF-DATEInsurance Coverage Effective Date198205DateThe first calendar day on which all of the other data elements in the same segment were effective.
INSURANCE-COVERAGE-END-DATEInsurance Coverage End Date206213DateThe last calendar day on which all of the other data elements in the same segment were effective.
STATE-NOTATIONState Notation214713VarcharA free text field for the submitting state to enter whatever information it chooses.
FillerVarcharSpace Filler for File Format
COVERAGE-TYPECoverage Type112113NumA code to indicate the level of coverage being provided under this policy for the insured by the TPL carrier.
TPL-MEDICAID-ELIGIBLE-PERSON-HEALTH-INSURANCE-COVERAGE-CATEGORIES
Column NameBusiness NameStartEndData TypeDescription
RECORD-IDRecord ID18VarcharThe Record ID represents the type of segment being reported. The Record ID communicates how the contents of a
given row of data should be interpreted depending on which segment type the Record ID represents. Each type of
segment collects different data elements so each segment type has a distinct layout. The first 3 characters identify
the relevant file (e.g., ELG, PRV, CIP, etc.). The last 5 digits are the segment identifier padded with leading zeros (e.g.,
00001, 00002, 00003, etc.).
SUBMITTING-STATESubmitting State910VarcharA code that uniquely identifies the U.S. State or Territory from which T-MSIS system data resources were received.
RECORD-NUMBERRecord Number1121NumA sequential number assigned by the submitter to identify each record segment row in the submission file. The Record Number, in conjunction with the Record Identifier, uniquely identifies a single record within the submission file.
INSURANCE-CARRIER-ID-NUMInsurance Carrier ID Number2233CharThe state-assigned identification number of the Third Party Liability (TPL) Entity.
INSURANCE-PLAN-IDInsurance Plan ID3453CharThe ID number issued by the Insurance carrier providing third party liability insurance coverage to beneficiaries. Typically the Plan ID/Plan Number is on the beneficiaries' insurance card.
INSURANCE-PLAN-TYPEInsurance Plan Type5455NumCode to classify the entity providing TPL coverage.
COVERAGE-TYPECoverage Type5657NumCode indicating the level of coverage being provided under this policy for the insured by the TPL carrier.
INSURANCE-CATEGORIES-EFF-DATEInsurance Categories Effective Date5865DateThe first calendar day on which all of the other data elements in the same segment were effective.
INSURANCE-CATEGORIES-END-DATEInsurance Categories End Date6673DateThe last calendar day on which all of the other data elements in the same segment were effective.
STATE-NOTATIONState Notation74573VarcharA free text field for the submitting state to enter whatever information it chooses.
FillerVarcharSpace Filler for File Format
TPL-MEDICAID-ELIGIBLE-OTHER-THIRD-PARTY-COVERAGE-INFORMATION
Column NameBusiness NameStartEndData TypeDescription
RECORD-IDRecord ID18VarcharThe Record ID represents the type of segment being reported. The Record ID communicates how the contents of a
given row of data should be interpreted depending on which segment type the Record ID represents. Each type of
segment collects different data elements so each segment type has a distinct layout. The first 3 characters identify
the relevant file (e.g., ELG, PRV, CIP, etc.). The last 5 digits are the segment identifier padded with leading zeros (e.g.,
00001, 00002, 00003, etc.).
SUBMITTING-STATESubmitting State910VarcharA code that uniquely identifies the U.S. State or Territory from which T-MSIS system data resources were received.
RECORD-NUMBERRecord Number1121NumA sequential number assigned by the submitter to identify each record segment row in the submission file. The Record Number, in conjunction with the Record Identifier, uniquely identifies a single record within the submission file.
MSIS-IDENTIFICATION-NUMMSIS Identification Number2241NumA state-assigned unique identification number used to identify a Medicaid/CHIP enrolled individual (except on service tracking payments). Value may be an SSN, temporary SSN or State-assigned eligible individual identifier.

MSIS Identification Numbers are a unique "key" value used to maintain referential integrity of data distributed over multiples files, segments and reporting periods.

See T-MSIS Guidance Document, "CMS Guidance: Reporting Shared MSIS Identification Numbers" for information on reporting the MSIS Identification Numbers ID for pregnant women, unborn children, mothers, and their deemed newborns younger than 1 year of age who share the
same MSIS Identification Number.
https://www.medicaid.gov/medicaid/data-and-systems/macbis/tmsis/tmsis-blog/entry/47572
TYPE-OF-OTHER-THIRD-PARTY-LIABILITYType of Other TPL4242VarcharThis code identifies the other types of liabilities an individual may have which are not necessarily defined as a health insurance plan listed Insurance Type Plan.
OTHER-TPL-EFF-DATEOther TPL Effective Date4350DateThe first calendar day on which all of the other data elements in the same segment were effective.
OTHER-TPL-END-DATEOther TPL End Date5158DateThe last calendar day on which all of the other data elements in the same segment were effective.
STATE-NOTATIONState Notation59558VarcharA free text field for the submitting state to enter whatever information it chooses.
FillerVarcharSpace Filler for File Format
TPL-ENTITY-CONTACT-INFORMATION
Column NameBusiness NameStartEndData TypeDescription
RECORD-IDRecord ID18VarcharThe Record ID represents the type of segment being reported. The Record ID communicates how the contents of a
given row of data should be interpreted depending on which segment type the Record ID represents. Each type of
segment collects different data elements so each segment type has a distinct layout. The first 3 characters identify
the relevant file (e.g., ELG, PRV, CIP, etc.). The last 5 digits are the segment identifier padded with leading zeros (e.g.,
00001, 00002, 00003, etc.).
SUBMITTING-STATESubmitting State910VarcharA code that uniquely identifies the U.S. State or Territory from which T-MSIS system data resources were received.
RECORD-NUMBERRecord Number1121NumA sequential number assigned by the submitter to identify each record segment row in the submission file. The Record Number, in conjunction with the Record Identifier, uniquely identifies a single record within the submission file.
INSURANCE-CARRIER-ID-NUMInsurance Carrier ID Number2233CharThe state-assigned identification number of the Third Party Liability (TPL) Entity.
TPL-ENTITY-ADDR-TYPETPL Entity Address Type3435NumThe type of address for a TPL Entity submitted in the record segment.
INSURANCE-CARRIER-ADDR-LN1Insurance Carrier Address Line 13695VarcharThe first line of a potentially multi-line physical street or mailing address for a given entity (e.g. person, organization, agency, etc.).
INSURANCE-CARRIER-ADDR-LN2Insurance Carrier Address Line 296155VarcharThe second line of a multi-line physical street or mailing address for a given entity (e.g. person, organization, agency, etc.).
INSURANCE-CARRIER-ADDR-LN3Insurance Carrier Address Line 3156215VarcharThe third line of a multi-line physical street or mailing address for a given entity (e.g. person, organization, agency, etc.).
INSURANCE-CARRIER-CITYInsurance Carrier City216243CharThe city component of an address associated with a given entity (e.g. person, organization, agency, etc.).
INSURANCE-CARRIER-STATEInsurance Carrier State244245CharThe ANSI state numeric code for the U.S. state, Territory, or the District of Columbia code of the TPL Insurance carrier.
INSURANCE-CARRIER-ZIP-CODEInsurance Carrier ZIP Code246254NumThe ZIP Code for the location being captured on the TPL Entity Contact Information record.
INSURANCE-CARRIER-PHONE-NUMInsurance Carrier Phone Number255264NumPhone number for a given entity (e.g. person, organization, agency).
TPL-ENTITY-CONTACT-INFO-EFF-DATETPL Entity Contact Info Effective Date265272DateThe first calendar day on which all of the other data elements in the same segment were effective.
TPL-ENTITY-CONTACT-INFO-END-DATETPL Entity Contact Info End Date273280DateThe last calendar day on which all of the other data elements in the same segment were effective.
